;;;59         CLK->CLKOCTL = CLK_CLKOCTL_CLKOEN_Msk | (u32ClkDiv) | (u32ClkDivBy1En << CLK_CLKOCTL_DIV1EN_Pos);

                  CLK_PowerDown PROC
;;;74       */
;;;75     void CLK_PowerDown(void)
00002c  b50e              PUSH     {r1-r3,lr}
;;;76     {
;;;77         volatile uint32_t u32SysTickTICKINT = 0, u32HIRCTCTL = 0, u32IRCTCTL = 0;
;;;78     
;;;79         /* Set the processor uses deep sleep as its low power mode */
;;;80         SCB->SCR |= SCB_SCR_SLEEPDEEP_Msk;

000030  6801              LDR      r1,[r0,#0]

;;;81     
;;;82         /* Set system Power-down enabled */
;;;83         CLK->PWRCTL |= (CLK_PWRCTL_PDEN_Msk);

;;;84     
;;;85         /* Store SysTick interrupt and HIRC auto trim setting */
;;;86         u32SysTickTICKINT = SysTick->CTRL & SysTick_CTRL_TICKINT_Msk;

00004a  690a              LDR      r2,[r1,#0x10]
00004c  f0020202          AND      r2,r2,#2
000050  9202              STR      r2,[sp,#8]
;;;87         u32HIRCTCTL = SYS->HIRCTCTL;
000052  6802              LDR      r2,[r0,#0]
000054  9201              STR      r2,[sp,#4]
;;;88         u32IRCTCTL = SYS->IRCTCTL;
000056  68c2              LDR      r2,[r0,#0xc]
000058  9200              STR      r2,[sp,#0]
;;;89     
;;;90         /* Disable SysTick interrupt and HIRC auto trim */
;;;91         SysTick->CTRL &= ~SysTick_CTRL_TICKINT_Msk;
00005a  690a              LDR      r2,[r1,#0x10]
00005c  f0220202          BIC      r2,r2,#2
000060  610a              STR      r2,[r1,#0x10]
;;;92         SYS->HIRCTCTL &= (~SYS_HIRCTCTL_FREQSEL_Msk);

000064  f0220203          BIC      r2,r2,#3
000068  6002              STR      r2,[r0,#0]
;;;93         SYS->IRCTCTL &= (~SYS_IRCTCTL_FREQSEL_Msk);

00006c  f0220203          BIC      r2,r2,#3
000070  60c2              STR      r2,[r0,#0xc]
000072  38e4              SUBS     r0,r0,#0xe4
;;;94     
;;;95         /* Chip enter Power-down mode after CPU run WFI instruction */
;;;96         __WFI();
000074  bf30              WFI      
;;;97     
;;;98         /* Restore SysTick interrupt and HIRC auto trim setting */
;;;99         if(u32SysTickTICKINT) SysTick->CTRL |= SysTick_CTRL_TICKINT_Msk;

;;;103

                  CLK_SetHCLK PROC
;;;349      */
;;;350    void CLK_SetHCLK(uint32_t u32ClkSrc, uint32_t u32ClkDiv)
0001d8  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;351    {
0001dc  4680              MOV      r8,r0
0001de  4689              MOV      r9,r1
;;;352        uint32_t u32HIRCSTB, u32TimeOutCount;
;;;353    
;;;354        /* Read HIRC clock source stable flag */
;;;355        u32HIRCSTB = CLK->STATUS & CLK_STATUS_HIRCSTB_Msk;
0001e0  4d83              LDR      r5,|L1.1008|
0001e2  3d10              SUBS     r5,r5,#0x10
0001e4  6da8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x58]
0001e6  f0000610          AND      r6,r0,#0x10
;;;356    
;;;357        /* Switch to HIRC for safe. Avoid HCLK too high when applying new divider. */
;;;358        CLK->PWRCTL |= CLK_PWRCTL_HIRCEN_Msk;
0001ea  68a8              LDR      r0,[r5,#8]
0001ec  f0400004          ORR      r0,r0,#4
0001f0  60a8              STR      r0,[r5,#8]
;;;359        CLK_WaitClockReady(CLK_STATUS_HIRCSTB_Msk);
0001f2  2010              MOVS     r0,#0x10
0001f4  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_WaitClockReady
;;;360        CLK->CLKSEL0 |= CLK_CLKSEL0_HCLKSEL_Msk;
0001f8  69a8              LDR      r0,[r5,#0x18]
0001fa  f0400007          ORR      r0,r0,#7
0001fe  61a8              STR      r0,[r5,#0x18]
;;;361    
;;;362        /* Switch to power level 0 for safe */
;;;363        SYS->PLCTL = (SYS->PLCTL & (~SYS_PLCTL_PLSEL_Msk)) | SYS_PLCTL_PLSEL_PL0;
000200  6828              LDR      r0,[r5,#0]
000202  f0200003          BIC      r0,r0,#3
000206  6028              STR      r0,[r5,#0]
000208  f5a575fc          SUB      r5,r5,#0x1f8
;;;364        u32TimeOutCount = SystemCoreClock; /* 1 second time-out */
00020c  4f7c              LDR      r7,|L1.1024|
00020e  683a              LDR      r2,[r7,#0]  ; SystemCoreClock
;;;365        while(SYS->PLSTS & SYS_PLSTS_PLCBUSY_Msk)
000210  e002              B        |L1.536|
                  |L1.530|
;;;366        {
;;;367            if(u32TimeOutCount-- == 0) break;
000212  1e52              SUBS     r2,r2,#1
000214  1c50              ADDS     r0,r2,#1
000216  d003              BEQ      |L1.544|
                  |L1.536|
000218  f8d501fc          LDR      r0,[r5,#0x1fc]        ;365
00021c  07c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#31             ;365
00021e  d1f8              BNE      |L1.530|
                  |L1.544|
;;;368        }
;;;369    
;;;370        /* Set Flash Access Cycle to 8 for safe */
;;;371        FMC->CYCCTL = (FMC->CYCCTL & (~FMC_CYCCTL_CYCLE_Msk)) | (8);
000220  4c78              LDR      r4,|L1.1028|
000222  6ce0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]
000224  f020000f          BIC      r0,r0,#0xf
000228  f0400008          ORR      r0,r0,#8
00022c  64e0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]
;;;372    
;;;373        /* Apply new Divider */
;;;374        CLK->CLKDIV0 = (CLK->CLKDIV0 & (~CLK_CLKDIV0_HCLKDIV_Msk)) | u32ClkDiv;
00022e  f8d50220          LDR      r0,[r5,#0x220]
000232  f020000f          BIC      r0,r0,#0xf
000236  ea400009          ORR      r0,r0,r9
00023a  f8c50220          STR      r0,[r5,#0x220]
;;;375    
;;;376        /* Switch HCLK to new HCLK source */
;;;377        CLK->CLKSEL0 = (CLK->CLKSEL0 & (~CLK_CLKSEL0_HCLKSEL_Msk)) | u32ClkSrc;
00023e  f8d50210          LDR      r0,[r5,#0x210]
000242  f0200007          BIC      r0,r0,#7
000246  ea400008          ORR      r0,r0,r8
00024a  f8c50210          STR      r0,[r5,#0x210]
;;;378    
;;;379        /* Update System Core Clock */
;;;380        SystemCoreClockUpdate();
00024e  f7fffffe          BL       SystemCoreClockUpdate
;;;381    
;;;382       /* Set power level according to new HCLK */
;;;383        if(SystemCoreClock <= FREQ_180MHZ)
000252  496d              LDR      r1,|L1.1032|
000254  6838              LDR      r0,[r7,#0]  ; SystemCoreClock
000256  4288              CMP      r0,r1
000258  d806              BHI      |L1.616|
;;;384        {
;;;385            SYS->PLCTL = (SYS->PLCTL & (~SYS_PLCTL_PLSEL_Msk)) | SYS_PLCTL_PLSEL_PL1;
00025a  f8d511f8          LDR      r1,[r5,#0x1f8]
00025e  f0210103          BIC      r1,r1,#3
000262  1c49              ADDS     r1,r1,#1
000264  f8c511f8          STR      r1,[r5,#0x1f8]
                  |L1.616|
;;;386        }
;;;387        u32TimeOutCount = SystemCoreClock; /* 1 second time-out */
000268  4601              MOV      r1,r0
;;;388        while(SYS->PLSTS & SYS_PLSTS_PLCBUSY_Msk)
00026a  e002              B        |L1.626|
                  |L1.620|
;;;389        {
;;;390            if(u32TimeOutCount-- == 0) break;
00026c  1e49              SUBS     r1,r1,#1
00026e  1c4a              ADDS     r2,r1,#1
000270  d003              BEQ      |L1.634|
                  |L1.626|
000272  f8d521fc          LDR      r2,[r5,#0x1fc]        ;388
000276  07d2              LSLS     r2,r2,#31             ;388
000278  d1f8              BNE      |L1.620|
                  |L1.634|
;;;391        }
;;;392    
;;;393        /* Switch flash access cycle to suitable value base on HCLK */
;;;394        if (SystemCoreClock >= FREQ_175MHZ)
00027a  4964              LDR      r1,|L1.1036|
00027c  4288              CMP      r0,r1
00027e  d306              BCC      |L1.654|
;;;395        {
;;;396            FMC->CYCCTL = (FMC->CYCCTL & (~FMC_CYCCTL_CYCLE_Msk)) | (8);
000280  6ce0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]
000282  f020000f          BIC      r0,r0,#0xf
000286  f0400008          ORR      r0,r0,#8
00028a  64e0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]
00028c  e03a              B        |L1.772|
                  |L1.654|
;;;397        }
;;;398        else if (SystemCoreClock >= FREQ_150MHZ)
00028e  4960              LDR      r1,|L1.1040|
000290  4288              CMP      r0,r1
000292  d305              BCC      |L1.672|
;;;399        {
;;;400            FMC->CYCCTL = (FMC->CYCCTL & (~FMC_CYCCTL_CYCLE_Msk)) | (7);
000294  6ce0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]
000296  f020000f          BIC      r0,r0,#0xf
00029a  1dc0              ADDS     r0,r0,#7
00029c  64e0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]
00029e  e031              B        |L1.772|
                  |L1.672|
;;;401        }
;;;402        else if (SystemCoreClock >= FREQ_125MHZ)
0002a0  495c              LDR      r1,|L1.1044|
0002a2  4288              CMP      r0,r1
0002a4  d305              BCC      |L1.690|
;;;403        {
;;;404            FMC->CYCCTL = (FMC->CYCCTL & (~FMC_CYCCTL_CYCLE_Msk)) | (6);
0002a6  6ce0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]
0002a8  f020000f          BIC      r0,r0,#0xf
0002ac  1d80              ADDS     r0,r0,#6
0002ae  64e0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]
0002b0  e028              B        |L1.772|
                  |L1.690|
;;;405        }
;;;406        else if (SystemCoreClock >= FREQ_100MHZ)
0002b2  4959              LDR      r1,|L1.1048|
0002b4  4288              CMP      r0,r1
0002b6  d305              BCC      |L1.708|
;;;407        {
;;;408            FMC->CYCCTL = (FMC->CYCCTL & (~FMC_CYCCTL_CYCLE_Msk)) | (5);
0002b8  6ce0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]
0002ba  f020000f          BIC      r0,r0,#0xf
0002be  1d40              ADDS     r0,r0,#5
0002c0  64e0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]
0002c2  e01f              B        |L1.772|
                  |L1.708|
;;;409        }
;;;410         else if (SystemCoreClock >= FREQ_75MHZ)
0002c4  4955              LDR      r1,|L1.1052|
0002c6  4288              CMP      r0,r1
0002c8  d305              BCC      |L1.726|
;;;411        {
;;;412            FMC->CYCCTL = (FMC->CYCCTL & (~FMC_CYCCTL_CYCLE_Msk)) | (4);
0002ca  6ce0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]
0002cc  f020000f          BIC      r0,r0,#0xf
0002d0  1d00              ADDS     r0,r0,#4
0002d2  64e0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]
0002d4  e016              B        |L1.772|
                  |L1.726|
;;;413        }
;;;414        else if (SystemCoreClock >= FREQ_50MHZ)
0002d6  4952              LDR      r1,|L1.1056|
0002d8  4288              CMP      r0,r1
0002da  d305              BCC      |L1.744|
;;;415        {
;;;416            FMC->CYCCTL = (FMC->CYCCTL & (~FMC_CYCCTL_CYCLE_Msk)) | (3);
0002dc  6ce0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]
0002de  f020000f          BIC      r0,r0,#0xf
0002e2  1cc0              ADDS     r0,r0,#3
0002e4  64e0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]
0002e6  e00d              B        |L1.772|
                  |L1.744|
;;;417        }
;;;418        else if (SystemCoreClock >= FREQ_25MHZ)
0002e8  494e              LDR      r1,|L1.1060|
0002ea  4288              CMP      r0,r1
0002ec  d305              BCC      |L1.762|
;;;419        {
;;;420            FMC->CYCCTL = (FMC->CYCCTL & (~FMC_CYCCTL_CYCLE_Msk)) | (2);
0002ee  6ce0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]
0002f0  f020000f          BIC      r0,r0,#0xf
0002f4  1c80              ADDS     r0,r0,#2
0002f6  64e0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]
0002f8  e004              B        |L1.772|
                  |L1.762|
;;;421        }
;;;422        else /* SystemCoreClock < FREQ_25MHZ */
;;;423        {
;;;424            FMC->CYCCTL = (FMC->CYCCTL & (~FMC_CYCCTL_CYCLE_Msk)) | (1);
0002fa  6ce0              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]
0002fc  f020000f          BIC      r0,r0,#0xf
000300  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
000302  64e0              STR      r0,[r4,#0x4c]
                  |L1.772|
;;;425        }
;;;426    
;;;427        /* Disable HIRC if HIRC is disabled before switching HCLK source */
;;;428        if(u32HIRCSTB == 0UL)
000304  2e00              CMP      r6,#0
000306  d105              BNE      |L1.788|
;;;429        {
;;;430            CLK->PWRCTL &= ~CLK_PWRCTL_HIRCEN_Msk;
000308  f8d50200          LDR      r0,[r5,#0x200]
00030c  f0200004          BIC      r0,r0,#4
000310  f8c50200          STR      r0,[r5,#0x200]
                  |L1.788|
;;;431        }
;;;432    }
000314  e8bd87f0          POP      {r4-r10,pc}
;;;433    
                          ENDP

                  CLK_GetPLLClockFreq PROC
;;;1401     */
;;;1402   uint32_t CLK_GetPLLClockFreq(void)
000318  b508              PUSH     {r3,lr}
;;;1403   {
;;;1404       uint32_t u32PllFreq = 0UL, u32PllReg;
00031a  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;1405       uint32_t u32FIN, u32NF, u32NR, u32NO;
;;;1406       uint8_t au8NoTbl[4] = {1U, 2U, 2U, 4U};
00031c  a142              ADR      r1,|L1.1064|
00031e  6809              LDR      r1,[r1,#0]
000320  9100              STR      r1,[sp,#0]
;;;1407   
;;;1408       u32PllReg = CLK->PLLCTL;
000322  4933              LDR      r1,|L1.1008|
000324  3138              ADDS     r1,r1,#0x38
000326  6809              LDR      r1,[r1,#0]
;;;1409   
;;;1410       if(u32PllReg & (CLK_PLLCTL_PD_Msk | CLK_PLLCTL_OE_Msk))
000328  f4112fa0          TST      r1,#0x50000
00032c  d114              BNE      |L1.856|
;;;1411       {
;;;1412           u32PllFreq = 0UL;       /* PLL is in power down mode or fix low */
;;;1413       }
;;;1414       else                        /* PLL is in normal mode */
;;;1415       {
;;;1416           /* PLL source clock */
;;;1417           if(u32PllReg & CLK_PLLCTL_PLLSRC_Msk)
;;;1418           {
;;;1419               u32FIN = __HIRC;    /* PLL source clock from HIRC */
00032e  4833              LDR      r0,|L1.1020|
;;;1420           }
;;;1421           else
;;;1422           {
;;;1423               u32FIN = __HXT;     /* PLL source clock from HXT */
;;;1424           }
;;;1425   
;;;1426           /* Calculate PLL frequency */
;;;1427           if(u32PllReg & CLK_PLLCTL_BP_Msk)
000330  038a              LSLS     r2,r1,#14
000332  d411              BMI      |L1.856|
;;;1428           {
;;;1429               u32PllFreq = u32FIN;  /* PLL is in bypass mode */
;;;1430           }
;;;1431           else
;;;1432           {
;;;1433               /* PLL is output enabled in normal work mode */
;;;1434               u32NO = au8NoTbl[((u32PllReg & CLK_PLLCTL_OUTDIV_Msk) >> CLK_PLLCTL_OUTDIV_Pos)];
000334  f3c13281          UBFX     r2,r1,#14,#2
000338  f81d2002          LDRB     r2,[sp,r2]
;;;1435               u32NF = ((u32PllReg & CLK_PLLCTL_FBDIV_Msk) >> CLK_PLLCTL_FBDIV_Pos) + 2UL;
00033c  f3c10308          UBFX     r3,r1,#0,#9
000340  1c9b              ADDS     r3,r3,#2
;;;1436               u32NR = ((u32PllReg & CLK_PLLCTL_INDIV_Msk) >> CLK_PLLCTL_INDIV_Pos) + 1UL;
000342  f3c12044          UBFX     r0,r1,#9,#5
000346  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
;;;1437   
;;;1438               /* u32FIN is shifted 2 bits to avoid overflow */
;;;1439               u32PllFreq = (((u32FIN >> 2) * (u32NF << 1)) / (u32NR * u32NO) << 2);
000348  0059              LSLS     r1,r3,#1
00034a  4b38              LDR      r3,|L1.1068|
00034c  4359              MULS     r1,r3,r1
00034e  fb10f002          SMULBB   r0,r0,r2
000352  fbb1f0f0          UDIV     r0,r1,r0
000356  0080              LSLS     r0,r0,#2
                  |L1.856|
;;;1440           }
;;;1441       }
;;;1442   
;;;1443       return u32PllFreq;
;;;1444   }
000358  bd08              POP      {r3,pc}
;;;1445   
                          ENDP

                  CLK_EnablePLL PROC
;;;1040     */
;;;1041   uint32_t CLK_EnablePLL(uint32_t u32PllClkSrc, uint32_t u32PllFreq)
00035a  e92d4ff3          PUSH     {r0,r1,r4-r11,lr}
;;;1042   {
00035e  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;1043       uint32_t u32PllSrcClk, u32NR, u32NF, u32NO, u32PllClk;
;;;1044       uint32_t u32Tmp, u32Tmp2, u32Tmp3, u32Min, u32MinNF, u32MinNR;
;;;1045   
;;;1046       /* Check if HCLK is PLL before configure PLL */
;;;1047       if( (CLK->CLKSEL0 & CLK_CLKSEL0_HCLKSEL_Msk) == CLK_CLKSEL0_HCLKSEL_PLL )
000360  f04f4680          MOV      r6,#0x40000000
000364  f8d60210          LDR      r0,[r6,#0x210]
000368  f0000007          AND      r0,r0,#7
00036c  2802              CMP      r0,#2
00036e  d01e              BEQ      |L1.942|
;;;1048       {
;;;1049           /* Return PLL frequency directly if HCLK is PLL */
;;;1050           return CLK_GetPLLClockFreq();
;;;1051       }
;;;1052       else
;;;1053       {
;;;1054           /* Disable PLL first to avoid unstable when setting PLL */
;;;1055           CLK->PLLCTL |= CLK_PLLCTL_PD_Msk;
000370  f8d60240          LDR      r0,[r6,#0x240]
000374  f4403080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10000
000378  f8c60240          STR      r0,[r6,#0x240]
;;;1056       }
;;;1057   
;;;1058       /* PLL source clock is from HXT */
;;;1059       if(u32PllClkSrc == CLK_PLLCTL_PLLSRC_HXT)
;;;1060       {
;;;1061           /* Enable HXT clock */
;;;1062           CLK->PWRCTL |= CLK_PWRCTL_HXTEN_Msk;
;;;1063   
;;;1064           /* Wait for HXT clock ready */
;;;1065           CLK_WaitClockReady(CLK_STATUS_HXTSTB_Msk);
;;;1066   
;;;1067           /* Select PLL source clock from HXT */
;;;1068           u32PllSrcClk = __HXT;
00037c  4d1f              LDR      r5,|L1.1020|
00037e  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]            ;1055
000380  b1c0              CBZ      r0,|L1.948|
;;;1069       }
;;;1070   
;;;1071       /* PLL source clock is from HIRC */
;;;1072       else
;;;1073       {
;;;1074           /* Enable HIRC clock */
;;;1075           CLK->PWRCTL |= CLK_PWRCTL_HIRCEN_Msk;
000382  f8d60200          LDR      r0,[r6,#0x200]
000386  f0400004          ORR      r0,r0,#4
00038a  f8c60200          STR      r0,[r6,#0x200]
;;;1076   
;;;1077           /* Wait for HIRC clock ready */
;;;1078           CLK_WaitClockReady(CLK_STATUS_HIRCSTB_Msk);
00038e  2010              MOVS     r0,#0x10
000390  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_WaitClockReady
                  |L1.916|
;;;1079   
;;;1080           /* Select PLL source clock from HIRC */
;;;1081           u32PllSrcClk = __HIRC;
;;;1082       }
;;;1083   
;;;1084       /* Check PLL frequency range */
;;;1085       /* Constraint 1: 50MHz < FOUT < 500MHz */
;;;1086       if((u32PllFreq <= FREQ_500MHZ) && (u32PllFreq >= FREQ_50MHZ))
000394  4822              LDR      r0,|L1.1056|
000396  4926              LDR      r1,|L1.1072|
000398  4240              RSBS     r0,r0,#0
00039a  4420              ADD      r0,r0,r4
00039c  4288              CMP      r0,r1
00039e  d87d              BHI      |L1.1180|
;;;1087       {
;;;1088           /* Select "NO" according to request frequency */
;;;1089           if((u32PllFreq < FREQ_100MHZ) && (u32PllFreq >= FREQ_50MHZ))
0003a0  491f              LDR      r1,|L1.1056|
0003a2  4288              CMP      r0,r1
0003a4  d210              BCS      |L1.968|
;;;1090           {
;;;1091               u32NO = 3UL;
0003a6  f04f0903          MOV      r9,#3
;;;1092               u32PllFreq = u32PllFreq << 2;
0003aa  00a4              LSLS     r4,r4,#2
0003ac  e018              B        |L1.992|
                  |L1.942|
0003ae  e8bd4ffc          POP      {r2-r11,lr}           ;1050
0003b2  e7fe              B        CLK_GetPLLClockFreq
                  |L1.948|
0003b4  f8d60200          LDR      r0,[r6,#0x200]        ;1062
0003b8  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1              ;1062
0003bc  f8c60200          STR      r0,[r6,#0x200]        ;1062
0003c0  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;1065
0003c2  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_WaitClockReady
0003c6  e7e5              B        |L1.916|
                  |L1.968|
;;;1093           }
;;;1094           else if((u32PllFreq < FREQ_200MHZ) && (u32PllFreq >= FREQ_100MHZ))
0003c8  4813              LDR      r0,|L1.1048|
0003ca  4913              LDR      r1,|L1.1048|
0003cc  4240              RSBS     r0,r0,#0
0003ce  4420              ADD      r0,r0,r4
0003d0  4288              CMP      r0,r1
0003d2  d203              BCS      |L1.988|
;;;1095           {
;;;1096               u32NO = 1UL;
0003d4  f04f0901          MOV      r9,#1
;;;1097               u32PllFreq = u32PllFreq << 1;
0003d8  0064              LSLS     r4,r4,#1
0003da  e001              B        |L1.992|
                  |L1.988|
;;;1098           }
;;;1099           else
;;;1100           {
;;;1101               u32NO = 0UL;
0003dc  f04f0900          MOV      r9,#0
                  |L1.992|
;;;1102           }
;;;1103   
;;;1104           /* u32NR start from 3 to avoid calculation overflow */
;;;1105           u32NR = 3UL;
0003e0  2103              MOVS     r1,#3
;;;1106   
;;;1107           /* Find best solution */
;;;1108           u32Min = (uint32_t) - 1;    /* initial u32Min to max value of uint32_t (0xFFFFFFFF) */
0003e2  1f0b              SUBS     r3,r1,#4
;;;1109           u32MinNR = 0UL;
0003e4  f04f0800          MOV      r8,#0
;;;1110           u32MinNF = 0UL;
0003e8  f04f0c00          MOV      r12,#0
;;;1111   
;;;1112           for(; u32NR <= 32UL; u32NR++)   /* max NR = 32 since NR = INDIV+1 and INDIV = 0~31 */
0003ec  e047              B        |L1.1150|
0003ee  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L1.1008|
                          DCD      0x40000208
                  |L1.1012|
                          DCD      0xe000ed10
                  |L1.1016|
                          DCD      0x400000e4
                  |L1.1020|
                          DCD      0x00b71b00
                  |L1.1024|
                          DCD      SystemCoreClock
                  |L1.1028|
                          DCD      0x4000c000
                  |L1.1032|
                          DCD      0x0aba9500
                  |L1.1036|
                          DCD      0x0a6e49c0
                  |L1.1040|
                          DCD      0x08f0d180
                  |L1.1044|
                          DCD      0x07735940
                  |L1.1048|
                          DCD      0x05f5e100
                  |L1.1052|
                          DCD      0x047868c0
                  |L1.1056|
                          DCD      0x02faf080
                  |L1.1060|
                          DCD      0x017d7840
                  |L1.1064|
000428  01020204          DCB      1,2,2,4
                  |L1.1068|
                          DCD      0x002dc6c0
                  |L1.1072|
                          DCD      0x1ad27480
                  |L1.1076|
;;;1113           {
;;;1114               u32Tmp = u32PllSrcClk / u32NR;                      /* FREF = FIN/NR */
000434  fbb5f7f1          UDIV     r7,r5,r1
;;;1115               if((u32Tmp >= FREQ_4MHZ) && (u32Tmp <= FREQ_8MHZ))  /* Constraint 2: 4MHz < FREF < 8MHz. */
000438  48f8              LDR      r0,|L1.2076|
00043a  4af8              LDR      r2,|L1.2076|
00043c  4438              ADD      r0,r0,r7
00043e  4252              RSBS     r2,r2,#0
000440  4290              CMP      r0,r2
000442  d81b              BHI      |L1.1148|
;;;1116               {
;;;1117                   for(u32NF = 2UL; u32NF <= 513UL; u32NF++)       /* NF = 2~513 since NF = FBDIV+2 and FBDIV = 0~511 */
000444  2202              MOVS     r2,#2
;;;1118                   {
;;;1119                       u32Tmp2 = (u32Tmp * u32NF) << 1;                            /* FVCO = FREF*2*NF */
;;;1120                       if((u32Tmp2 >= FREQ_200MHZ) && (u32Tmp2 <= FREQ_500MHZ))    /* Constraint 3: 200MHz < FVCO < 500MHz */
000446  f8dfa3d8          LDR      r10,|L1.2080|
00044a  f8dfb3d8          LDR      r11,|L1.2084|
                  |L1.1102|
00044e  fb07f002          MUL      r0,r7,r2              ;1119
000452  0040              LSLS     r0,r0,#1              ;1119
000454  eb000e0a          ADD      lr,r0,r10
000458  45de              CMP      lr,r11
00045a  d80a              BHI      |L1.1138|
;;;1121                       {
;;;1122                           u32Tmp3 = (u32Tmp2 > u32PllFreq) ? u32Tmp2 - u32PllFreq : u32PllFreq - u32Tmp2;
00045c  42a0              CMP      r0,r4
00045e  d901              BLS      |L1.1124|
000460  1b00              SUBS     r0,r0,r4
000462  e000              B        |L1.1126|
                  |L1.1124|
000464  1a20              SUBS     r0,r4,r0
                  |L1.1126|
;;;1123                           if(u32Tmp3 < u32Min)
000466  4298              CMP      r0,r3
000468  d203              BCS      |L1.1138|
;;;1124                           {
;;;1125                               u32Min = u32Tmp3;
00046a  4603              MOV      r3,r0
;;;1126                               u32MinNR = u32NR;
00046c  4688              MOV      r8,r1
;;;1127                               u32MinNF = u32NF;
00046e  4694              MOV      r12,r2
;;;1128   
;;;1129                               /* Break when get good results */
;;;1130                               if(u32Min == 0UL)
000470  b123              CBZ      r3,|L1.1148|
                  |L1.1138|
000472  1c52              ADDS     r2,r2,#1              ;1117
000474  f2402001          MOV      r0,#0x201             ;1117
000478  4282              CMP      r2,r0                 ;1117
00047a  d9e8              BLS      |L1.1102|
                  |L1.1148|
00047c  1c49              ADDS     r1,r1,#1              ;1112
                  |L1.1150|
00047e  2920              CMP      r1,#0x20              ;1112
000480  d9d8              BLS      |L1.1076|
;;;1131                               {
;;;1132                                   break;
;;;1133                               }
;;;1134                           }
;;;1135                       }
;;;1136                   }
;;;1137               }
;;;1138           }
;;;1139   
;;;1140           /* Enable and apply new PLL setting. */
;;;1141           CLK->PLLCTL = u32PllClkSrc |
000482  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
000484  ea403189          ORR      r1,r0,r9,LSL #14
000488  f1a80001          SUB      r0,r8,#1
00048c  ea412040          ORR      r0,r1,r0,LSL #9
000490  f1ac0102          SUB      r1,r12,#2
000494  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
000496  f8c60240          STR      r0,[r6,#0x240]
;;;1142                         (u32NO << CLK_PLLCTL_OUTDIV_Pos) |
;;;1143                         ((u32MinNR - 1UL) << CLK_PLLCTL_INDIV_Pos) |
;;;1144                         ((u32MinNF - 2UL) << CLK_PLLCTL_FBDIV_Pos);
;;;1145   
;;;1146           /* Actual PLL output clock frequency. FOUT = (FIN/NR)*2*NF*(1/NO) */
;;;1147           u32PllClk = u32PllSrcClk / ((u32NO + 1UL) * u32MinNR) * (u32MinNF << 1);
00049a  e000              B        |L1.1182|
                  |L1.1180|
00049c  e009              B        |L1.1202|
                  |L1.1182|
00049e  f1090901          ADD      r9,r9,#1
0004a2  fb09f908          MUL      r9,r9,r8
0004a6  fbb5f4f9          UDIV     r4,r5,r9
0004aa  ea4f004c          LSL      r0,r12,#1
0004ae  4344              MULS     r4,r0,r4
0004b0  e006              B        |L1.1216|
                  |L1.1202|
;;;1148       }
;;;1149       else
;;;1150       {
;;;1151           /* Apply default PLL setting and return */
;;;1152           CLK->PLLCTL = u32PllClkSrc | CLK_PLLCTL_192MHz_HXT;
0004b2  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
0004b4  f244211e          MOV      r1,#0x421e
0004b8  4308              ORRS     r0,r0,r1
0004ba  f8c60240          STR      r0,[r6,#0x240]
;;;1153   
;;;1154           /* Actual PLL output clock frequency */
;;;1155           u32PllClk = FREQ_192MHZ;
0004be  4cda              LDR      r4,|L1.2088|
                  |L1.1216|
;;;1156       }
;;;1157   
;;;1158       /* Wait for PLL clock stable */
;;;1159       CLK_WaitClockReady(CLK_STATUS_PLLSTB_Msk);
0004c0  2004              MOVS     r0,#4
0004c2  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_WaitClockReady
;;;1160   
;;;1161       /* Return actual PLL output clock frequency */
;;;1162       return u32PllClk;
0004c6  4620              MOV      r0,r4
;;;1163   }
0004c8  e8bd8ffc          POP      {r2-r11,pc}
;;;1164   
                          ENDP

                  CLK_SetCoreClock PROC
;;;281      */
;;;282    uint32_t CLK_SetCoreClock(uint32_t u32Hclk)
0004cc  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;283    {
0004ce  4605              MOV      r5,r0
;;;284        uint32_t u32HIRCSTB;
;;;285    
;;;286        /* Read HIRC clock source stable flag */
;;;287        u32HIRCSTB = CLK->STATUS & CLK_STATUS_HIRCSTB_Msk;
0004d0  f04f4480          MOV      r4,#0x40000000
0004d4  f8d40250          LDR      r0,[r4,#0x250]
0004d8  f0000610          AND      r6,r0,#0x10
;;;288    
;;;289        /* Check HCLK frequency range is 50MHz ~ 200MHz */
;;;290        if(u32Hclk > FREQ_200MHZ)
0004dc  48d0              LDR      r0,|L1.2080|
0004de  4240              RSBS     r0,r0,#0
0004e0  4285              CMP      r5,r0
0004e2  d901              BLS      |L1.1256|
;;;291        {
;;;292            u32Hclk = FREQ_200MHZ;
0004e4  4605              MOV      r5,r0
0004e6  e003              B        |L1.1264|
                  |L1.1256|
;;;293        }
;;;294        else if(u32Hclk < FREQ_50MHZ)
0004e8  48d0              LDR      r0,|L1.2092|
0004ea  4285              CMP      r5,r0
0004ec  d200              BCS      |L1.1264|
;;;295        {
;;;296            u32Hclk = FREQ_50MHZ;
0004ee  4605              MOV      r5,r0
                  |L1.1264|
;;;297        }
;;;298    
;;;299        /* Switch HCLK clock source to HIRC clock for safe */
;;;300        CLK->PWRCTL |= CLK_PWRCTL_HIRCEN_Msk;
0004f0  f5047400          ADD      r4,r4,#0x200
0004f4  6820              LDR      r0,[r4,#0]
0004f6  f0400004          ORR      r0,r0,#4
0004fa  6020              STR      r0,[r4,#0]
;;;301        CLK_WaitClockReady(CLK_STATUS_HIRCSTB_Msk);
0004fc  2010              MOVS     r0,#0x10
0004fe  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_WaitClockReady
;;;302        CLK->CLKSEL0 |= CLK_CLKSEL0_HCLKSEL_Msk;
000502  6920              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x10]
000504  f0400007          ORR      r0,r0,#7
000508  6120              STR      r0,[r4,#0x10]
;;;303        CLK->CLKDIV0 &= (~CLK_CLKDIV0_HCLKDIV_Msk);
00050a  6a20              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x20]
00050c  f020000f          BIC      r0,r0,#0xf
000510  6220              STR      r0,[r4,#0x20]
;;;304    
;;;305        /* Configure PLL setting if HXT clock is stable */
;;;306        if(CLK->STATUS & CLK_STATUS_HXTSTB_Msk)
000512  6d20              LDR      r0,[r4,#0x50]
000514  f5a47400          SUB      r4,r4,#0x200
000518  07c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#31
00051a  d005              BEQ      |L1.1320|
;;;307        {
;;;308            u32Hclk = CLK_EnablePLL(CLK_PLLCTL_PLLSRC_HXT, u32Hclk);
00051c  4629              MOV      r1,r5
00051e  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000520  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_EnablePLL
000524  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000526  e009              B        |L1.1340|
                  |L1.1320|
;;;309        }
;;;310        /* Configure PLL setting if HXT clock is not stable */
;;;311        else
;;;312        {
;;;313            u32Hclk = CLK_EnablePLL(CLK_PLLCTL_PLLSRC_HIRC, u32Hclk);
000528  4629              MOV      r1,r5
00052a  f44f2000          MOV      r0,#0x80000
00052e  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_EnablePLL
000532  4605              MOV      r5,r0
;;;314    
;;;315            /* Read HIRC clock source stable flag */
;;;316            u32HIRCSTB = CLK->STATUS & CLK_STATUS_HIRCSTB_Msk;
000534  f8d40250          LDR      r0,[r4,#0x250]
000538  f0000610          AND      r6,r0,#0x10
                  |L1.1340|
;;;317        }
;;;318    
;;;319        /* Select HCLK clock source to PLL,
;;;320           select HCLK clock source divider as 1,
;;;321           adjust power level, flash access cycle and update system core clock
;;;322        */
;;;323        CLK_SetHCLK(CLK_CLKSEL0_HCLKSEL_PLL, CLK_CLKDIV0_HCLK(1UL));
00053c  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
00053e  2002              MOVS     r0,#2
000540  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_SetHCLK
;;;324    
;;;325        /* Disable HIRC if HIRC is disabled before setting core clock */
;;;326        if(u32HIRCSTB == 0UL)
000544  b92e              CBNZ     r6,|L1.1362|
;;;327        {
;;;328            CLK->PWRCTL &= ~CLK_PWRCTL_HIRCEN_Msk;
000546  f8d40200          LDR      r0,[r4,#0x200]
00054a  f0200004          BIC      r0,r0,#4
00054e  f8c40200          STR      r0,[r4,#0x200]
                  |L1.1362|
;;;329        }
;;;330    
;;;331        /* Return actually HCLK frequency is PLL frequency divide 1 */
;;;332        return u32Hclk;
000552  4628              MOV      r0,r5
;;;333    }
000554  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;334    
                          ENDP

                  CLK_SetModuleClock PROC
;;;674      */
;;;675    void CLK_SetModuleClock(uint32_t u32ModuleIdx, uint32_t u32ClkSrc, uint32_t u32ClkDiv)
000556  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;676    {
000558  b08c              SUB      sp,sp,#0x30
00055a  4605              MOV      r5,r0
00055c  460e              MOV      r6,r1
00055e  4614              MOV      r4,r2
;;;677        uint32_t u32Sel = 0UL, u32Div = 0UL;
;;;678        uint32_t au32SelTbl[5] = {0x0UL, 0x4UL, 0x8UL, 0xCUL, 0x4CUL};       /* CLK_CLKSEL0~4 */
000560  2214              MOVS     r2,#0x14
000562  49b3              LDR      r1,|L1.2096|
000564  a807              ADD      r0,sp,#0x1c
000566  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy4
;;;679        uint32_t au32DivTbl[6] = {0x0UL, 0x4UL, 0x8UL, 0xCUL, 0x10UL, 0x1C}; /* CLK_CLKDIV0~5 */
00056a  2218              MOVS     r2,#0x18
00056c  49b0              LDR      r1,|L1.2096|
00056e  3114              ADDS     r1,r1,#0x14
000570  a801              ADD      r0,sp,#4
000572  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy4
;;;680        uint32_t u32RTCCKEN = CLK->APBCLK0 & CLK_APBCLK0_RTCCKEN_Msk;
000576  f04f4080          MOV      r0,#0x40000000
00057a  f8d01208          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x208]
00057e  f0010102          AND      r1,r1,#2
;;;681    
;;;682        if(u32ModuleIdx == RTC_MODULE)      /* RTC clock source configuration */
000582  f06f5200          MVN      r2,#0x20000000
000586  42d5              CMN      r5,r2
000588  d117              BNE      |L1.1466|
;;;683        {
;;;684            if(u32RTCCKEN == 0UL)
00058a  2900              CMP      r1,#0
00058c  d105              BNE      |L1.1434|
;;;685            {
;;;686                CLK->APBCLK0 |= CLK_APBCLK0_RTCCKEN_Msk; /* Enable RTC clock to get LXT clock source */
00058e  f8d01208          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x208]
000592  f0410102          ORR      r1,r1,#2
000596  f8c01208          STR      r1,[r0,#0x208]
                  |L1.1434|
;;;687            }
;;;688    
;;;689            /* Select RTC clock source */
;;;690            RTC->LXTCTL = (RTC->LXTCTL & (~RTC_LXTCTL_RTCCKSEL_Msk)) | (u32ClkSrc);
00059a  49a6              LDR      r1,|L1.2100|
00059c  680a              LDR      r2,[r1,#0]
00059e  f0220280          BIC      r2,r2,#0x80
0005a2  ea420206          ORR      r2,r2,r6
0005a6  600a              STR      r2,[r1,#0]
;;;691    
;;;692            if(u32RTCCKEN == 0UL)
0005a8  d105              BNE      |L1.1462|
;;;693            {
;;;694                CLK->APBCLK0 &= (~CLK_APBCLK0_RTCCKEN_Msk); /* Disable RTC clock if it is disabled before */
0005aa  f8d01208          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x208]
0005ae  f0210102          BIC      r1,r1,#2
0005b2  f8c01208          STR      r1,[r0,#0x208]
                  |L1.1462|
;;;695            }
;;;696        }
;;;697        else /* Others clock source configuration */
;;;698        {
;;;699            /* Configure clock source divider */
;;;700            switch(u32ModuleIdx)
;;;701            {
;;;702                /* For 8 bits divider */
;;;703                case EADC0_MODULE: CLK->CLKDIV0 = (CLK->CLKDIV0 & (~CLK_CLKDIV0_EADC0DIV_Msk)) | (u32ClkDiv);  break;
;;;704                case SDH0_MODULE:  CLK->CLKDIV0 = (CLK->CLKDIV0 & (~CLK_CLKDIV0_SDH0DIV_Msk)) | (u32ClkDiv);   break;
;;;705                case SC0_MODULE:   CLK->CLKDIV1 = (CLK->CLKDIV1 & (~CLK_CLKDIV1_SC0DIV_Msk)) | (u32ClkDiv);    break;
;;;706                case SC1_MODULE:   CLK->CLKDIV1 = (CLK->CLKDIV1 & (~CLK_CLKDIV1_SC1DIV_Msk)) | (u32ClkDiv);    break;
;;;707                case SC2_MODULE:   CLK->CLKDIV1 = (CLK->CLKDIV1 & (~CLK_CLKDIV1_SC2DIV_Msk)) | (u32ClkDiv);    break;
;;;708                case PSIO_MODULE:  CLK->CLKDIV1 = (CLK->CLKDIV1 & (~CLK_CLKDIV1_PSIODIV_Msk)) | (u32ClkDiv);   break;
;;;709                case KPI_MODULE:   CLK->CLKDIV2 = (CLK->CLKDIV2 & (~CLK_CLKDIV2_KPIDIV_Msk)) | (u32ClkDiv);    break;
;;;710                case EADC1_MODULE: CLK->CLKDIV2 = (CLK->CLKDIV2 & (~CLK_CLKDIV2_EADC1DIV_Msk)) | (u32ClkDiv);  break;
;;;711                case SEN_MODULE:   CLK->CLKDIV3 = (CLK->CLKDIV3 & (~CLK_CLKDIV3_VSENSEDIV_Msk)) | (u32ClkDiv); break;
;;;712                case SDH1_MODULE:  CLK->CLKDIV3 = (CLK->CLKDIV3 & (~CLK_CLKDIV3_SDH1DIV_Msk)) | (u32ClkDiv);   break;
;;;713                case EADC2_MODULE: CLK->CLKDIV5 = (CLK->CLKDIV5 & (~CLK_CLKDIV5_EADC2DIV_Msk)) | (u32ClkDiv);  break;
;;;714    
;;;715                /* Others */
;;;716                default:
;;;717                {
;;;718                    if(MODULE_CLKDIV_Msk(u32ModuleIdx) != MODULE_NoMsk)
;;;719                    {
;;;720                        /* Get clock divider control register address */
;;;721                        u32Div = (uint32_t)&CLK->CLKDIV0 + (au32DivTbl[MODULE_CLKDIV(u32ModuleIdx)]);
;;;722                        /* Apply new divider */
;;;723                        M32(u32Div) = (M32(u32Div) & (~(MODULE_CLKDIV_Msk(u32ModuleIdx) << MODULE_CLKDIV_Pos(u32ModuleIdx)))) | u32ClkDiv;
;;;724                    }
;;;725                }
;;;726                break;
;;;727            }
;;;728    
;;;729            /* Configure clock source */
;;;730            if(MODULE_CLKSEL_Msk(u32ModuleIdx) != MODULE_NoMsk)
;;;731            {
;;;732                /* Get clock select control register address */
;;;733                u32Sel = (uint32_t)&CLK->CLKSEL0 + (au32SelTbl[MODULE_CLKSEL(u32ModuleIdx)]);
;;;734                /* Set new clock selection setting */
;;;735                M32(u32Sel) = (M32(u32Sel) & (~(MODULE_CLKSEL_Msk(u32ModuleIdx) << MODULE_CLKSEL_Pos(u32ModuleIdx)))) | u32ClkSrc;
;;;736            }
;;;737        }
;;;738    
;;;739    }
0005b6  b00c              ADD      sp,sp,#0x30
0005b8  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L1.1466|
0005ba  499f              LDR      r1,|L1.2104|
0005bc  eba50201          SUB      r2,r5,r1              ;700
0005c0  428d              CMP      r5,r1                 ;700
0005c2  d073              BEQ      |L1.1708|
0005c4  dc21              BGT      |L1.1546|
0005c6  499d              LDR      r1,|L1.2108|
0005c8  eba50201          SUB      r2,r5,r1              ;700
0005cc  428d              CMP      r5,r1                 ;700
0005ce  d06e              BEQ      |L1.1710|
0005d0  dc0d              BGT      |L1.1518|
0005d2  499b              LDR      r1,|L1.2112|
0005d4  1869              ADDS     r1,r5,r1              ;700
0005d6  d06b              BEQ      |L1.1712|
0005d8  4a9a              LDR      r2,|L1.2116|
0005da  42d1              CMN      r1,r2                 ;700
0005dc  d136              BNE      |L1.1612|
0005de  f8d01220          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x220]        ;704
0005e2  f021417f          BIC      r1,r1,#0xff000000     ;704
0005e6  4321              ORRS     r1,r1,r4              ;704
0005e8  f8c01220          STR      r1,[r0,#0x220]        ;704
0005ec  e041              B        |L1.1650|
                  |L1.1518|
0005ee  4996              LDR      r1,|L1.2120|
0005f0  1851              ADDS     r1,r2,r1              ;700
0005f2  d053              BEQ      |L1.1692|
0005f4  4a95              LDR      r2,|L1.2124|
0005f6  42d1              CMN      r1,r2                 ;700
0005f8  d128              BNE      |L1.1612|
0005fa  f8d01228          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x228]        ;710
0005fe  f021417f          BIC      r1,r1,#0xff000000     ;710
000602  4321              ORRS     r1,r1,r4              ;710
000604  f8c01228          STR      r1,[r0,#0x228]        ;710
000608  e033              B        |L1.1650|
                  |L1.1546|
00060a  4991              LDR      r1,|L1.2128|
00060c  1a53              SUBS     r3,r2,r1              ;700
00060e  428a              CMP      r2,r1                 ;700
000610  d057              BEQ      |L1.1730|
000612  dc0d              BGT      |L1.1584|
000614  498f              LDR      r1,|L1.2132|
000616  1851              ADDS     r1,r2,r1              ;700
000618  d04b              BEQ      |L1.1714|
00061a  4a8f              LDR      r2,|L1.2136|
00061c  42d1              CMN      r1,r2                 ;700
00061e  d115              BNE      |L1.1612|
000620  f8d01224          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x224]        ;706
000624  f421417f          BIC      r1,r1,#0xff00         ;706
000628  4321              ORRS     r1,r1,r4              ;706
00062a  f8c01224          STR      r1,[r0,#0x224]        ;706
00062e  e020              B        |L1.1650|
                  |L1.1584|
000630  498a              LDR      r1,|L1.2140|
000632  1859              ADDS     r1,r3,r1              ;700
000634  d065              BEQ      |L1.1794|
000636  4a8a              LDR      r2,|L1.2144|
000638  42d1              CMN      r1,r2                 ;700
00063a  d107              BNE      |L1.1612|
00063c  f8d01228          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x228]        ;709
000640  f421417f          BIC      r1,r1,#0xff00         ;709
000644  4321              ORRS     r1,r1,r4              ;709
000646  f8c01228          STR      r1,[r0,#0x228]        ;709
00064a  e012              B        |L1.1650|
                  |L1.1612|
00064c  0aa8              LSRS     r0,r5,#10             ;718
00064e  0700              LSLS     r0,r0,#28             ;718
000650  d00f              BEQ      |L1.1650|
000652  a801              ADD      r0,sp,#4              ;721
000654  f3c53182          UBFX     r1,r5,#14,#3          ;721
000658  f8500021          LDR      r0,[r0,r1,LSL #2]     ;721
00065c  4981              LDR      r1,|L1.2148|
00065e  4408              ADD      r0,r0,r1              ;721
000660  6801              LDR      r1,[r0,#0]            ;723
000662  f3c52283          UBFX     r2,r5,#10,#4          ;723
000666  f3c51344          UBFX     r3,r5,#5,#5           ;723
00066a  409a              LSLS     r2,r2,r3              ;723
00066c  4391              BICS     r1,r1,r2              ;723
00066e  4321              ORRS     r1,r1,r4              ;723
000670  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]            ;723
                  |L1.1650|
000672  0da8              LSRS     r0,r5,#22             ;730
000674  0700              LSLS     r0,r0,#28             ;730
000676  d09e              BEQ      |L1.1462|
000678  a807              ADD      r0,sp,#0x1c           ;733
00067a  f3c56182          UBFX     r1,r5,#26,#3          ;733
00067e  f8500021          LDR      r0,[r0,r1,LSL #2]     ;733
000682  4978              LDR      r1,|L1.2148|
000684  3910              SUBS     r1,r1,#0x10           ;733
000686  4408              ADD      r0,r0,r1              ;733
000688  6801              LDR      r1,[r0,#0]            ;735
00068a  f3c55283          UBFX     r2,r5,#22,#4          ;735
00068e  f3c54344          UBFX     r3,r5,#17,#5          ;735
000692  409a              LSLS     r2,r2,r3              ;735
000694  4391              BICS     r1,r1,r2              ;735
000696  4331              ORRS     r1,r1,r6              ;735
000698  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]            ;735
00069a  e78c              B        |L1.1462|
                  |L1.1692|
00069c  f8d01220          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x220]        ;703
0006a0  f421017f          BIC      r1,r1,#0xff0000       ;703
0006a4  4321              ORRS     r1,r1,r4              ;703
0006a6  f8c01220          STR      r1,[r0,#0x220]        ;703
0006aa  e7e2              B        |L1.1650|
                  |L1.1708|
0006ac  e011              B        |L1.1746|
                  |L1.1710|
0006ae  e020              B        |L1.1778|
                  |L1.1712|
0006b0  e017              B        |L1.1762|
                  |L1.1714|
0006b2  f8d01224          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x224]        ;705
0006b6  f02101ff          BIC      r1,r1,#0xff           ;705
0006ba  4321              ORRS     r1,r1,r4              ;705
0006bc  f8c01224          STR      r1,[r0,#0x224]        ;705
0006c0  e7d7              B        |L1.1650|
                  |L1.1730|
0006c2  f8d01224          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x224]        ;707
0006c6  f421017f          BIC      r1,r1,#0xff0000       ;707
0006ca  4321              ORRS     r1,r1,r4              ;707
0006cc  f8c01224          STR      r1,[r0,#0x224]        ;707
0006d0  e7cf              B        |L1.1650|
                  |L1.1746|
0006d2  f8d01224          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x224]        ;708
0006d6  f021417f          BIC      r1,r1,#0xff000000     ;708
0006da  4321              ORRS     r1,r1,r4              ;708
0006dc  f8c01224          STR      r1,[r0,#0x224]        ;708
0006e0  e7c7              B        |L1.1650|
                  |L1.1762|
0006e2  f8d0122c          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x22c]        ;711
0006e6  f421417f          BIC      r1,r1,#0xff00         ;711
0006ea  4321              ORRS     r1,r1,r4              ;711
0006ec  f8c0122c          STR      r1,[r0,#0x22c]        ;711
0006f0  e7bf              B        |L1.1650|
                  |L1.1778|
0006f2  f8d0122c          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x22c]        ;712
0006f6  f021417f          BIC      r1,r1,#0xff000000     ;712
0006fa  4321              ORRS     r1,r1,r4              ;712
0006fc  f8c0122c          STR      r1,[r0,#0x22c]        ;712
000700  e7b7              B        |L1.1650|
                  |L1.1794|
000702  f8d0123c          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x23c]        ;713
000706  f021417f          BIC      r1,r1,#0xff000000     ;713
00070a  4321              ORRS     r1,r1,r4              ;713
00070c  f8c0123c          STR      r1,[r0,#0x23c]        ;713
000710  e7af              B        |L1.1650|
;;;740    
                          ENDP

                  CLK_SetSysTickClockSrc PROC
;;;752      */
;;;753    void CLK_SetSysTickClockSrc(uint32_t u32ClkSrc)
000712  4954              LDR      r1,|L1.2148|
;;;754    {
;;;755        CLK->CLKSEL0 = (CLK->CLKSEL0 & ~CLK_CLKSEL0_STCLKSEL_Msk) | u32ClkSrc;
000714  3910              SUBS     r1,r1,#0x10
000716  680a              LDR      r2,[r1,#0]
000718  f0220238          BIC      r2,r2,#0x38
00071c  4302              ORRS     r2,r2,r0
00071e  600a              STR      r2,[r1,#0]
;;;756    }
000720  4770              BX       lr
;;;757    
                          ENDP

                  CLK_EnableXtalRC PROC
;;;769      */
;;;770    void CLK_EnableXtalRC(uint32_t u32ClkMask)
000722  4950              LDR      r1,|L1.2148|
;;;771    {
;;;772        CLK->PWRCTL |= u32ClkMask;
000724  3920              SUBS     r1,r1,#0x20
000726  680a              LDR      r2,[r1,#0]
000728  4302              ORRS     r2,r2,r0
00072a  600a              STR      r2,[r1,#0]
;;;773    }
00072c  4770              BX       lr
;;;774    
                          ENDP

                  CLK_DisableXtalRC PROC
;;;786      */
;;;787    void CLK_DisableXtalRC(uint32_t u32ClkMask)
00072e  494d              LDR      r1,|L1.2148|
;;;788    {
;;;789        CLK->PWRCTL &= ~u32ClkMask;
000730  3920              SUBS     r1,r1,#0x20
000732  680a              LDR      r2,[r1,#0]
000734  4382              BICS     r2,r2,r0
000736  600a              STR      r2,[r1,#0]
;;;790    }
000738  4770              BX       lr
;;;791    
                          ENDP

                  CLK_EnableModuleClock PROC
;;;897      */
;;;898    void CLK_EnableModuleClock(uint32_t u32ModuleIdx)
00073a  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;899    {
00073c  b086              SUB      sp,sp,#0x18
00073e  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;900        uint32_t u32TmpVal = 0UL, u32TmpAddr = 0UL;
;;;901    
;;;902        /* Index, 0x0:AHBCLK0, 0x1:APBCLK0, 0x2:APBCLK1, 0x3:APBCLK2, 0x4:AHBCLK1 */
;;;903        uint32_t au32ClkEnTbl[5] = {0x0UL, 0x4UL, 0x8UL, 0x34UL, 0x54UL};
000740  2214              MOVS     r2,#0x14
000742  493b              LDR      r1,|L1.2096|
000744  312c              ADDS     r1,r1,#0x2c
000746  a801              ADD      r0,sp,#4
000748  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy4
;;;904    
;;;905        u32TmpVal = (1UL << MODULE_IP_EN_Pos(u32ModuleIdx));
00074c  f004001f          AND      r0,r4,#0x1f
000750  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
000752  4081              LSLS     r1,r1,r0
;;;906        u32TmpAddr = (uint32_t)&CLK->AHBCLK0 + au32ClkEnTbl[MODULE_APBCLK(u32ModuleIdx)];
000754  0f60              LSRS     r0,r4,#29
000756  aa01              ADD      r2,sp,#4
000758  f8520020          LDR      r0,[r2,r0,LSL #2]
00075c  4a41              LDR      r2,|L1.2148|
00075e  3a1c              SUBS     r2,r2,#0x1c
000760  4410              ADD      r0,r0,r2
;;;907    
;;;908        *(volatile uint32_t *)u32TmpAddr |= u32TmpVal;
000762  6802              LDR      r2,[r0,#0]
000764  430a              ORRS     r2,r2,r1
000766  6002              STR      r2,[r0,#0]
                  |L1.1896|
;;;909    }
000768  b006              ADD      sp,sp,#0x18
00076a  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;910    
                          ENDP

                  CLK_DisableModuleClock PROC
;;;1016     */
;;;1017   void CLK_DisableModuleClock(uint32_t u32ModuleIdx)
00076c  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1018   {
00076e  b086              SUB      sp,sp,#0x18
000770  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;1019       uint32_t u32TmpVal = 0UL, u32TmpAddr = 0UL;
;;;1020   
;;;1021       /* Index, 0x0:AHBCLK0, 0x1:APBCLK0, 0x2:APBCLK1, 0x3:APBCLK2, 0x4:AHBCLK1 */
;;;1022       uint32_t au32ClkEnTbl[5] = {0x0UL, 0x4UL, 0x8UL, 0x34UL, 0x54UL};
000772  2214              MOVS     r2,#0x14
000774  492e              LDR      r1,|L1.2096|
000776  3140              ADDS     r1,r1,#0x40
000778  a801              ADD      r0,sp,#4
00077a  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy4
;;;1023   
;;;1024       u32TmpVal = ~(1UL << MODULE_IP_EN_Pos(u32ModuleIdx));
00077e  f004011f          AND      r1,r4,#0x1f
000782  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000784  4088              LSLS     r0,r0,r1
000786  43c1              MVNS     r1,r0
;;;1025       u32TmpAddr = (uint32_t)&CLK->AHBCLK0 + au32ClkEnTbl[MODULE_APBCLK(u32ModuleIdx)];
000788  0f60              LSRS     r0,r4,#29
00078a  aa01              ADD      r2,sp,#4
00078c  f8520020          LDR      r0,[r2,r0,LSL #2]
000790  4a34              LDR      r2,|L1.2148|
000792  3a1c              SUBS     r2,r2,#0x1c
000794  4410              ADD      r0,r0,r2
;;;1026   
;;;1027       *(uint32_t *)u32TmpAddr &= u32TmpVal;
000796  6802              LDR      r2,[r0,#0]
000798  400a              ANDS     r2,r2,r1
00079a  6002              STR      r2,[r0,#0]
;;;1028   }
00079c  e7e4              B        |L1.1896|
;;;1029   
                          ENDP

                  CLK_DisablePLL PROC
;;;1172     */
;;;1173   void CLK_DisablePLL(void)
00079e  f04f4080          MOV      r0,#0x40000000
;;;1174   {
;;;1175       if( (CLK->CLKSEL0 & CLK_CLKSEL0_HCLKSEL_Msk) != CLK_CLKSEL0_HCLKSEL_PLL )
0007a2  f8d01210          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x210]
0007a6  f0010107          AND      r1,r1,#7
0007aa  2902              CMP      r1,#2
0007ac  d005              BEQ      |L1.1978|
;;;1176           CLK->PLLCTL |= CLK_PLLCTL_PD_Msk;
0007ae  f8d01240          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x240]
0007b2  f4413180          ORR      r1,r1,#0x10000
0007b6  f8c01240          STR      r1,[r0,#0x240]
                  |L1.1978|
;;;1177   }
0007ba  4770              BX       lr
;;;1178   
                          ENDP

                  CLK_EnableSysTick PROC
;;;1224     */
;;;1225   void CLK_EnableSysTick(uint32_t u32ClkSrc, uint32_t u32Count)
0007bc  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}
;;;1226   {
;;;1227       /* Set System Tick counter disabled */
;;;1228       SysTick->CTRL = 0UL;
0007be  f04f22e0          MOV      r2,#0xe000e000
0007c2  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
0007c4  6115              STR      r5,[r2,#0x10]
;;;1229   
;;;1230       /* Set System Tick clock source */
;;;1231       if( u32ClkSrc == CLK_CLKSEL0_STCLKSEL_HCLK )
;;;1232       {
;;;1233           /* Disable System Tick clock source from external reference clock */
;;;1234           CLK->AHBCLK0 &= ~CLK_AHBCLK0_STCKEN_Msk;
0007c6  f04f4380          MOV      r3,#0x40000000
0007ca  2804              CMP      r0,#4                 ;1231
0007cc  d015              BEQ      |L1.2042|
;;;1235   
;;;1236           /* Select System Tick clock source from core clock */
;;;1237           SysTick->CTRL |= SysTick_CTRL_CLKSOURCE_Msk;
;;;1238       }
;;;1239       else
;;;1240       {
;;;1241           /* Enable System Tick clock source from external reference clock */
;;;1242           CLK->AHBCLK0 |= CLK_AHBCLK0_STCKEN_Msk;
0007ce  f5037301          ADD      r3,r3,#0x204
0007d2  681c              LDR      r4,[r3,#0]
0007d4  f0440410          ORR      r4,r4,#0x10
0007d8  601c              STR      r4,[r3,#0]
;;;1243   
;;;1244           /* Select System Tick external reference clock source */
;;;1245           CLK->CLKSEL0 = (CLK->CLKSEL0 & ~CLK_CLKSEL0_STCLKSEL_Msk) | u32ClkSrc;
0007da  68dc              LDR      r4,[r3,#0xc]
0007dc  f0240438          BIC      r4,r4,#0x38
0007e0  4304              ORRS     r4,r4,r0
0007e2  60dc              STR      r4,[r3,#0xc]
;;;1246   
;;;1247           /* Select System Tick clock source from external reference clock */
;;;1248           SysTick->CTRL &= ~SysTick_CTRL_CLKSOURCE_Msk;
0007e4  6910              LDR      r0,[r2,#0x10]
0007e6  f0200004          BIC      r0,r0,#4
0007ea  6110              STR      r0,[r2,#0x10]
                  |L1.2028|
;;;1249       }
;;;1250   
;;;1251       /* Set System Tick reload value */
;;;1252       SysTick->LOAD = u32Count;
0007ec  6151              STR      r1,[r2,#0x14]
;;;1253   
;;;1254       /* Clear System Tick current value and counter flag */
;;;1255       SysTick->VAL = 0UL;
0007ee  6195              STR      r5,[r2,#0x18]
;;;1256   
;;;1257       /* Set System Tick interrupt enabled and counter enabled */
;;;1258       SysTick->CTRL |= SysTick_CTRL_TICKINT_Msk | SysTick_CTRL_ENABLE_Msk;
0007f0  6910              LDR      r0,[r2,#0x10]
0007f2  f0400003          ORR      r0,r0,#3
0007f6  6110              STR      r0,[r2,#0x10]
;;;1259   }
0007f8  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
                  |L1.2042|
0007fa  f8d30204          LDR      r0,[r3,#0x204]        ;1234
0007fe  f0200010          BIC      r0,r0,#0x10           ;1234
000802  f8c30204          STR      r0,[r3,#0x204]        ;1234
000806  6910              LDR      r0,[r2,#0x10]         ;1237
000808  f0400004          ORR      r0,r0,#4              ;1237
00080c  6110              STR      r0,[r2,#0x10]         ;1237
00080e  e7ed              B        |L1.2028|
;;;1260   
                          ENDP

                  CLK_DisableSysTick PROC
;;;1266     */
;;;1267   void CLK_DisableSysTick(void)
000810  f04f21e0          MOV      r1,#0xe000e000
;;;1268   {
;;;1269       /* Set System Tick counter disabled */
;;;1270       SysTick->CTRL = 0UL;
000814  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000816  6108              STR      r0,[r1,#0x10]
                  |L1.2072|
;;;1271   }
000818  4770              BX       lr
00081a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L1.2076|
                          DCD      0xffc2f700
                  |L1.2080|
                          DCD      0xf4143e00
                  |L1.2084|
                          DCD      0x11e1a300
                  |L1.2088|
                          DCD      0x0b71b000
                  |L1.2092|
                          DCD      0x02faf080
                  |L1.2096|
                          DCD      ||.constdata||
                  |L1.2100|
                          DCD      0x40041100
                  |L1.2104|
                          DCD      0x49f87f0a
                  |L1.2108|
                          DCD      0x00ecff11
                  |L1.2112|
                          DCD      0xff1f02f7
                  |L1.2116|
                          DCD      0xfff8be03
                  |L1.2120|
                          DCD      0xe018c0f5
                  |L1.2124|
                          DCD      0xdffc3dfd
                  |L1.2128|
                          DCD      0x02cffef8
                  |L1.2132|
                          DCD      0xfd38030a
                  |L1.2136|
                          DCD      0xfffbfeff
                  |L1.2140|
                          DCD      0xebebbefc
                  |L1.2144|
                          DCD      0xf4100206
                  |L1.2148|
                          DCD      0x40000220
                          ENDP

                  CLK_SetPowerDownMode PROC
;;;1286   
;;;1287   void CLK_SetPowerDownMode(uint32_t u32PDMode)
000868  49f3              LDR      r1,|L1.3128|
;;;1288   {
;;;1289       CLK->PMUCTL = (CLK->PMUCTL & ~(CLK_PMUCTL_PDMSEL_Msk)) | u32PDMode;
00086a  680a              LDR      r2,[r1,#0]
00086c  f0220207          BIC      r2,r2,#7
000870  4302              ORRS     r2,r2,r0
000872  600a              STR      r2,[r1,#0]
;;;1290   }
000874  e7d0              B        |L1.2072|
;;;1291   
                          ENDP

                  CLK_EnableDPDWKPin PROC
;;;1317   
;;;1318   void CLK_EnableDPDWKPin(uint32_t u32TriggerType)
000876  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}
;;;1319   {
;;;1320       uint32_t u32Pin1, u32Pin2, u32Pin3, u32Pin4;
;;;1321   
;;;1322       /* Get DPD wake-up pin configuration */
;;;1323       u32Pin1 = ((u32TriggerType) & CLK_PMUCTL_WKPINEN1_Msk);
000878  f0007540          AND      r5,r0,#0x3000000
;;;1324       u32Pin2 = ((u32TriggerType) & CLK_PMUCTL_WKPINEN2_Msk);
00087c  f0006240          AND      r2,r0,#0xc000000
;;;1325       u32Pin3 = ((u32TriggerType) & CLK_PMUCTL_WKPINEN3_Msk);
000880  f0005340          AND      r3,r0,#0x30000000
;;;1326       u32Pin4 = ((u32TriggerType) & CLK_PMUCTL_WKPINEN4_Msk);
000884  f0004440          AND      r4,r0,#0xc0000000
;;;1327   
;;;1328       /* Set DPD wake-up pin configuration */
;;;1329       if(u32Pin1)
;;;1330       {
;;;1331           CLK->PMUCTL = (CLK->PMUCTL & ~(CLK_PMUCTL_WKPINEN1_Msk)) | u32TriggerType;
000888  f04f4180          MOV      r1,#0x40000000
00088c  2d00              CMP      r5,#0                 ;1329
00088e  d007              BEQ      |L1.2208|
000890  f8d12290          LDR      r2,[r1,#0x290]
000894  f0227240          BIC      r2,r2,#0x3000000
000898  4302              ORRS     r2,r2,r0
00089a  f8c12290          STR      r2,[r1,#0x290]
;;;1332       }
;;;1333       else if(u32Pin2)
;;;1334       {
;;;1335           CLK->PMUCTL = (CLK->PMUCTL & ~(CLK_PMUCTL_WKPINEN2_Msk)) | u32TriggerType;
;;;1336       }
;;;1337       else if(u32Pin3)
;;;1338       {
;;;1339           CLK->PMUCTL = (CLK->PMUCTL & ~(CLK_PMUCTL_WKPINEN3_Msk)) | u32TriggerType;
;;;1340       }
;;;1341       else if(u32Pin4)
;;;1342       {
;;;1343           CLK->PMUCTL = (CLK->PMUCTL & ~(CLK_PMUCTL_WKPINEN4_Msk)) | u32TriggerType;
;;;1344       }
;;;1345       else
;;;1346       {
;;;1347           CLK->PMUCTL = (CLK->PMUCTL & ~(CLK_PMUCTL_WKPINEN0_Msk)) | u32TriggerType;
;;;1348       }
;;;1349   
;;;1350   }
00089e  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
                  |L1.2208|
0008a0  b13a              CBZ      r2,|L1.2226|
0008a2  f8d12290          LDR      r2,[r1,#0x290]        ;1335
0008a6  f0226240          BIC      r2,r2,#0xc000000      ;1335
0008aa  4302              ORRS     r2,r2,r0              ;1335
0008ac  f8c12290          STR      r2,[r1,#0x290]        ;1335
0008b0  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
                  |L1.2226|
0008b2  b13b              CBZ      r3,|L1.2244|
0008b4  f8d12290          LDR      r2,[r1,#0x290]        ;1339
0008b8  f0225240          BIC      r2,r2,#0x30000000     ;1339
0008bc  4302              ORRS     r2,r2,r0              ;1339
0008be  f8c12290          STR      r2,[r1,#0x290]        ;1339
0008c2  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
                  |L1.2244|
0008c4  b13c              CBZ      r4,|L1.2262|
0008c6  f8d12290          LDR      r2,[r1,#0x290]        ;1343
0008ca  f0224240          BIC      r2,r2,#0xc0000000     ;1343
0008ce  4302              ORRS     r2,r2,r0              ;1343
0008d0  f8c12290          STR      r2,[r1,#0x290]        ;1343
0008d4  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
                  |L1.2262|
0008d6  f8d12290          LDR      r2,[r1,#0x290]        ;1347
0008da  f4223240          BIC      r2,r2,#0x30000        ;1347
0008de  4302              ORRS     r2,r2,r0              ;1347
0008e0  f8c12290          STR      r2,[r1,#0x290]        ;1347
0008e4  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
;;;1351   
                          ENDP

                  CLK_GetPMUWKSrc PROC
;;;1360   
;;;1361   uint32_t CLK_GetPMUWKSrc(void)
0008e6  48d4              LDR      r0,|L1.3128|
;;;1362   {
;;;1363       return (CLK->PMUSTS);
0008e8  1d00              ADDS     r0,r0,#4
0008ea  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]
;;;1364   }
0008ec  e794              B        |L1.2072|
;;;1365   
                          ENDP

                  CLK_EnableSPDWKPin PROC
;;;1380    */
;;;1381   void CLK_EnableSPDWKPin(uint32_t u32Port, uint32_t u32Pin, uint32_t u32TriggerType, uint32_t u32DebounceEn)
0008ee  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}
;;;1382   {
;;;1383       uint32_t u32tmpAddr = 0UL;
;;;1384       uint32_t u32tmpVal = 0UL;
;;;1385   
;;;1386       /* GPx Stand-by Power-down Wake-up Pin Select */
;;;1387       u32tmpAddr = (uint32_t)&CLK->PASWKCTL;
0008f0  4cd1              LDR      r4,|L1.3128|
0008f2  3410              ADDS     r4,r4,#0x10
;;;1388       u32tmpAddr += (0x4UL * u32Port);
0008f4  eb040080          ADD      r0,r4,r0,LSL #2
;;;1389   
;;;1390       u32tmpVal = inpw((uint32_t *)u32tmpAddr);
0008f8  6804              LDR      r4,[r0,#0]
;;;1391       u32tmpVal = (u32tmpVal & ~(CLK_PASWKCTL_WKPSEL_Msk | CLK_PASWKCTL_PRWKEN_Msk | CLK_PASWKCTL_PFWKEN_Msk | CLK_PASWKCTL_DBEN_Msk | CLK_PASWKCTL_WKEN_Msk)) |
0008fa  f24015f7          MOV      r5,#0x1f7
0008fe  43ac              BICS     r4,r4,r5
000900  ea441101          ORR      r1,r4,r1,LSL #4
000904  4311              ORRS     r1,r1,r2
000906  4319              ORRS     r1,r1,r3
000908  f0410101          ORR      r1,r1,#1
;;;1392                   (u32Pin << CLK_PASWKCTL_WKPSEL_Pos) | u32TriggerType | u32DebounceEn | CLK_SPDWKPIN_ENABLE;
;;;1393       outpw((uint32_t *)u32tmpAddr, u32tmpVal);
00090c  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]
;;;1394   }
00090e  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
;;;1395   
                          ENDP

                  CLK_GetModuleClockSource PROC
;;;1507     */
;;;1508   uint32_t CLK_GetModuleClockSource(uint32_t u32ModuleIdx)
000910  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}
;;;1509   {
000912  b085              SUB      sp,sp,#0x14
000914  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;1510       uint32_t u32TmpVal = 0UL, u32TmpAddr = 0UL;
000916  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
;;;1511       uint32_t au32SelTbl[5] = {0x0UL, 0x4UL, 0x8UL, 0xCUL, 0x4CUL}; /* CLK_CLKSEL0~4 */
000918  2214              MOVS     r2,#0x14
00091a  49c8              LDR      r1,|L1.3132|
00091c  4668              MOV      r0,sp
00091e  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy4
;;;1512       uint32_t u32RTCCKEN = CLK->APBCLK0 & CLK_APBCLK0_RTCCKEN_Msk;
000922  f04f4080          MOV      r0,#0x40000000
000926  f8d01208          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x208]
00092a  f0010102          AND      r1,r1,#2
;;;1513   
;;;1514       /* Get clock source selection setting */
;;;1515       if(u32ModuleIdx == RTC_MODULE)
00092e  f06f5200          MVN      r2,#0x20000000
000932  42d4              CMN      r4,r2
000934  d113              BNE      |L1.2398|
;;;1516       {
;;;1517           if(u32RTCCKEN == 0UL)
000936  2900              CMP      r1,#0
000938  d105              BNE      |L1.2374|
;;;1518           {
;;;1519               /* Enable RTC clock to get LXT clock source */
;;;1520               CLK->APBCLK0 |= CLK_APBCLK0_RTCCKEN_Msk;
00093a  f8d01208          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x208]
00093e  f0410102          ORR      r1,r1,#2
000942  f8c01208          STR      r1,[r0,#0x208]
                  |L1.2374|
;;;1521           }
;;;1522   
;;;1523           u32TmpVal = ((RTC->LXTCTL & RTC_LXTCTL_RTCCKSEL_Msk) >> RTC_LXTCTL_RTCCKSEL_Pos);
000946  49be              LDR      r1,|L1.3136|
000948  6809              LDR      r1,[r1,#0]
00094a  f3c115c0          UBFX     r5,r1,#7,#1
;;;1524   
;;;1525           if(u32RTCCKEN == 0UL)
00094e  d119              BNE      |L1.2436|
;;;1526           {
;;;1527               /* Disable RTC clock if it is disabled before */
;;;1528               CLK->APBCLK0 &= (~CLK_APBCLK0_RTCCKEN_Msk);
000950  f8d01208          LDR      r1,[r0,#0x208]
000954  f0210102          BIC      r1,r1,#2
000958  f8c01208          STR      r1,[r0,#0x208]
00095c  e012              B        |L1.2436|
                  |L1.2398|
;;;1529           }
;;;1530   
;;;1531       }
;;;1532       else if(MODULE_CLKSEL_Msk(u32ModuleIdx) != MODULE_NoMsk)
00095e  ea4f5094          LSR      r0,r4,#22
000962  0700              LSLS     r0,r0,#28
000964  d00e              BEQ      |L1.2436|
;;;1533       {
;;;1534           /* Get clock select control register address */
;;;1535           u32TmpAddr = (uint32_t)&CLK->CLKSEL0 + (au32SelTbl[MODULE_CLKSEL(u32ModuleIdx)]);
000966  f3c46182          UBFX     r1,r4,#26,#3
00096a  f85d0021          LDR      r0,[sp,r1,LSL #2]
00096e  49b2              LDR      r1,|L1.3128|
000970  3980              SUBS     r1,r1,#0x80
000972  4408              ADD      r0,r0,r1
;;;1536   
;;;1537           /* Get clock source selection setting */
;;;1538           u32TmpVal = ((inpw((uint32_t *)u32TmpAddr) & (MODULE_CLKSEL_Msk(u32ModuleIdx) << MODULE_CLKSEL_Pos(u32ModuleIdx))) >> MODULE_CLKSEL_Pos(u32ModuleIdx));
000974  6805              LDR      r5,[r0,#0]
000976  f3c45183          UBFX     r1,r4,#22,#4
00097a  f3c44044          UBFX     r0,r4,#17,#5
00097e  4081              LSLS     r1,r1,r0
000980  400d              ANDS     r5,r5,r1
000982  40c5              LSRS     r5,r5,r0
                  |L1.2436|
;;;1539       }
;;;1540   
;;;1541       return u32TmpVal;
;;;1542   
;;;1543   }
000984  b005              ADD      sp,sp,#0x14
000986  4628              MOV      r0,r5                 ;1541
000988  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
;;;1544   
                          ENDP

                  CLK_GetModuleClockDivider PROC
;;;1580     */
;;;1581   uint32_t CLK_GetModuleClockDivider(uint32_t u32ModuleIdx)
00098a  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;1582   {
00098c  b086              SUB      sp,sp,#0x18
00098e  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;1583       uint32_t u32DivVal = 0UL, u32DivAddr = 0UL;
;;;1584       uint32_t au32DivTbl[6] = {0x0UL, 0x4UL, 0x8UL, 0xCUL, 0x10UL, 0x1C}; /* CLK_CLKDIV0~5 */
000990  2218              MOVS     r2,#0x18
000992  49aa              LDR      r1,|L1.3132|
000994  3114              ADDS     r1,r1,#0x14
000996  4668              MOV      r0,sp
000998  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy4
;;;1585   
;;;1586       switch(u32ModuleIdx)
00099c  4aa9              LDR      r2,|L1.3140|
00099e  1aa1              SUBS     r1,r4,r2
;;;1587       {
;;;1588           /* For 8 bits divider */
;;;1589           case EADC0_MODULE: u32DivVal = (CLK->CLKDIV0 & CLK_CLKDIV0_EADC0DIV_Msk) >> CLK_CLKDIV0_EADC0DIV_Pos;   break;
0009a0  0750              LSLS     r0,r2,#29
0009a2  4294              CMP      r4,r2                 ;1586
0009a4  d053              BEQ      |L1.2638|
0009a6  dc19              BGT      |L1.2524|
0009a8  49a7              LDR      r1,|L1.3144|
0009aa  eba40201          SUB      r2,r4,r1              ;1586
0009ae  428c              CMP      r4,r1                 ;1586
0009b0  d056              BEQ      |L1.2656|
0009b2  dc09              BGT      |L1.2504|
0009b4  49a5              LDR      r1,|L1.3148|
0009b6  1861              ADDS     r1,r4,r1              ;1586
0009b8  d04d              BEQ      |L1.2646|
0009ba  4aa5              LDR      r2,|L1.3152|
0009bc  42d1              CMN      r1,r2                 ;1586
0009be  d128              BNE      |L1.2578|
;;;1590           case SDH0_MODULE:  u32DivVal = (CLK->CLKDIV0 & CLK_CLKDIV0_SDH0DIV_Msk) >> CLK_CLKDIV0_SDH0DIV_Pos;     break;
0009c0  f8d00220          LDR      r0,[r0,#0x220]
0009c4  0e00              LSRS     r0,r0,#24
;;;1591           case SC0_MODULE:   u32DivVal = (CLK->CLKDIV1 & CLK_CLKDIV1_SC0DIV_Msk) >> CLK_CLKDIV1_SC0DIV_Pos;       break;
;;;1592           case SC1_MODULE:   u32DivVal = (CLK->CLKDIV1 & CLK_CLKDIV1_SC1DIV_Msk) >> CLK_CLKDIV1_SC1DIV_Pos;       break;
;;;1593           case SC2_MODULE:   u32DivVal = (CLK->CLKDIV1 & CLK_CLKDIV1_SC2DIV_Msk) >> CLK_CLKDIV1_SC2DIV_Pos;       break;
;;;1594           case PSIO_MODULE:  u32DivVal = (CLK->CLKDIV1 & CLK_CLKDIV1_PSIODIV_Msk) >> CLK_CLKDIV1_PSIODIV_Pos;     break;
;;;1595           case KPI_MODULE:   u32DivVal = (CLK->CLKDIV2 & CLK_CLKDIV2_KPIDIV_Msk) >> CLK_CLKDIV2_KPIDIV_Pos;       break;
;;;1596           case EADC1_MODULE: u32DivVal = (CLK->CLKDIV2 & CLK_CLKDIV2_EADC1DIV_Msk) >> CLK_CLKDIV2_EADC1DIV_Pos;   break;
;;;1597           case SEN_MODULE:   u32DivVal = (CLK->CLKDIV3 & CLK_CLKDIV3_VSENSEDIV_Msk) >> CLK_CLKDIV3_VSENSEDIV_Pos; break;
;;;1598           case SDH1_MODULE:  u32DivVal = (CLK->CLKDIV3 & CLK_CLKDIV3_SDH1DIV_Msk) >> CLK_CLKDIV3_SDH1DIV_Pos;     break;
;;;1599           case EADC2_MODULE: u32DivVal = (CLK->CLKDIV5 & CLK_CLKDIV5_EADC2DIV_Msk) >> CLK_CLKDIV5_EADC2DIV_Pos;   break;
;;;1600   
;;;1601           /* Others */
;;;1602           default:
;;;1603           {
;;;1604               /* Get clock divider control register address */
;;;1605               u32DivAddr = (uint32_t)&CLK->CLKDIV0 + (au32DivTbl[MODULE_CLKDIV(u32ModuleIdx)]);
;;;1606               /* Get clock divider number setting */
;;;1607               u32DivVal = ((inpw((uint32_t *)u32DivAddr) & (MODULE_CLKDIV_Msk(u32ModuleIdx) << MODULE_CLKDIV_Pos(u32ModuleIdx))) >> MODULE_CLKDIV_Pos(u32ModuleIdx));
;;;1608           }
;;;1609           break;
;;;1610       }
;;;1611   
;;;1612       return u32DivVal;
;;;1613   }
0009c6  e6cf              B        |L1.1896|
                  |L1.2504|
0009c8  49a2              LDR      r1,|L1.3156|
0009ca  1851              ADDS     r1,r2,r1              ;1586
0009cc  d031              BEQ      |L1.2610|
0009ce  4aa2              LDR      r2,|L1.3160|
0009d0  42d1              CMN      r1,r2                 ;1586
0009d2  d11e              BNE      |L1.2578|
0009d4  f8d00228          LDR      r0,[r0,#0x228]        ;1596
0009d8  0e00              LSRS     r0,r0,#24             ;1596
0009da  e6c5              B        |L1.1896|
                  |L1.2524|
0009dc  4a9f              LDR      r2,|L1.3164|
0009de  1a8b              SUBS     r3,r1,r2              ;1586
0009e0  4291              CMP      r1,r2                 ;1586
0009e2  d02f              BEQ      |L1.2628|
0009e4  dc0a              BGT      |L1.2556|
0009e6  4a9e              LDR      r2,|L1.3168|
0009e8  1889              ADDS     r1,r1,r2              ;1586
0009ea  d027              BEQ      |L1.2620|
0009ec  4a9d              LDR      r2,|L1.3172|
0009ee  42d1              CMN      r1,r2                 ;1586
0009f0  d10f              BNE      |L1.2578|
0009f2  f8d00224          LDR      r0,[r0,#0x224]        ;1592
0009f6  f3c02007          UBFX     r0,r0,#8,#8           ;1592
0009fa  e6b5              B        |L1.1896|
                  |L1.2556|
0009fc  499a              LDR      r1,|L1.3176|
0009fe  1859              ADDS     r1,r3,r1              ;1586
000a00  d032              BEQ      |L1.2664|
000a02  4a9a              LDR      r2,|L1.3180|
000a04  42d1              CMN      r1,r2                 ;1586
000a06  d104              BNE      |L1.2578|
000a08  f8d00228          LDR      r0,[r0,#0x228]        ;1595
000a0c  f3c02007          UBFX     r0,r0,#8,#8           ;1595
000a10  e6aa              B        |L1.1896|
                  |L1.2578|
000a12  f3c43182          UBFX     r1,r4,#14,#3          ;1605
000a16  f85d0021          LDR      r0,[sp,r1,LSL #2]     ;1605
000a1a  4987              LDR      r1,|L1.3128|
000a1c  3970              SUBS     r1,r1,#0x70           ;1605
000a1e  4408              ADD      r0,r0,r1              ;1605
000a20  6800              LDR      r0,[r0,#0]            ;1607
000a22  f3c42283          UBFX     r2,r4,#10,#4          ;1607
000a26  f3c41144          UBFX     r1,r4,#5,#5           ;1607
000a2a  408a              LSLS     r2,r2,r1              ;1607
000a2c  4010              ANDS     r0,r0,r2              ;1607
000a2e  40c8              LSRS     r0,r0,r1              ;1607
000a30  e69a              B        |L1.1896|
                  |L1.2610|
000a32  f8d00220          LDR      r0,[r0,#0x220]        ;1589
000a36  f3c04007          UBFX     r0,r0,#16,#8          ;1589
000a3a  e695              B        |L1.1896|
                  |L1.2620|
000a3c  f8d00224          LDR      r0,[r0,#0x224]        ;1591
000a40  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0                 ;1591
000a42  e691              B        |L1.1896|
                  |L1.2628|
000a44  f8d00224          LDR      r0,[r0,#0x224]        ;1593
000a48  f3c04007          UBFX     r0,r0,#16,#8          ;1593
000a4c  e68c              B        |L1.1896|
                  |L1.2638|
000a4e  f8d00224          LDR      r0,[r0,#0x224]        ;1594
000a52  0e00              LSRS     r0,r0,#24             ;1594
000a54  e688              B        |L1.1896|
                  |L1.2646|
000a56  f8d0022c          LDR      r0,[r0,#0x22c]        ;1597
000a5a  f3c02007          UBFX     r0,r0,#8,#8           ;1597
000a5e  e683              B        |L1.1896|
                  |L1.2656|
000a60  f8d0022c          LDR      r0,[r0,#0x22c]        ;1598
000a64  0e00              LSRS     r0,r0,#24             ;1598
000a66  e67f              B        |L1.1896|
                  |L1.2664|
000a68  f8d0023c          LDR      r0,[r0,#0x23c]        ;1599
000a6c  0e00              LSRS     r0,r0,#24             ;1599
000a6e  e67b              B        |L1.1896|
;;;1614   
                          ENDP

                  CLK_DisablePLLFN PROC
;;;1621     */
;;;1622   void CLK_DisablePLLFN(void)
000a70  4871              LDR      r0,|L1.3128|
;;;1623   {
;;;1624       CLK->PLLFNCTL1 |= CLK_PLLFNCTL1_PD_Msk;
000a72  3844              SUBS     r0,r0,#0x44
000a74  6801              LDR      r1,[r0,#0]
000a76  f0415180          ORR      r1,r1,#0x10000000
000a7a  6001              STR      r1,[r0,#0]
;;;1625   }
000a7c  e6cc              B        |L1.2072|
;;;1626   
                          ENDP

                  CLK_EnablePLLFN PROC
;;;1636     */
;;;1637   uint32_t CLK_EnablePLLFN(uint32_t u32PllClkSrc, uint32_t u32PllFreq)
000a7e  e92d4ff0          PUSH     {r4-r11,lr}
;;;1638   {
000a82  4682              MOV      r10,r0
000a84  460f              MOV      r7,r1
;;;1639       uint32_t u32FIN, u32FVCO, u32FREF, u32PllClk;
;;;1640       uint32_t u32NR = 0UL, u32NF = 0UL, u32NO, u32X = 0UL;
000a86  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
000a88  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
000a8a  46a0              MOV      r8,r4
;;;1641       float fNX_X = 0.0, fX = 0.0;
;;;1642   
;;;1643       /* Disable PLLFN first to avoid unstable when setting PLLFN */
;;;1644       CLK->PLLFNCTL1 |= CLK_PLLFNCTL1_PD_Msk;
000a8c  f04f4980          MOV      r9,#0x40000000
000a90  f8d9024c          LDR      r0,[r9,#0x24c]
000a94  f0405080          ORR      r0,r0,#0x10000000
000a98  f8c9024c          STR      r0,[r9,#0x24c]
;;;1645   
;;;1646       /* PLLFN source clock is from HXT */
;;;1647       if(u32PllClkSrc == CLK_PLLFNCTL1_PLLSRC_HXT)
;;;1648       {
;;;1649           /* Enable HXT clock */
;;;1650           CLK->PWRCTL |= CLK_PWRCTL_HXTEN_Msk;
;;;1651   
;;;1652           /* Wait for HXT clock ready */
;;;1653           CLK_WaitClockReady(CLK_STATUS_HXTSTB_Msk);
;;;1654   
;;;1655           /* Select PLLFN source clock from HXT */
;;;1656           u32FIN = __HXT;
000a9c  4e74              LDR      r6,|L1.3184|
000a9e  f1ba0f00          CMP      r10,#0                ;1647
000aa2  d014              BEQ      |L1.2766|
;;;1657       }
;;;1658   
;;;1659       /* PLL source clock is from HIRC */
;;;1660       else
;;;1661       {
;;;1662           /* Enable HIRC clock */
;;;1663           CLK->PWRCTL |= CLK_PWRCTL_HIRCEN_Msk;
000aa4  f8d90200          LDR      r0,[r9,#0x200]
000aa8  f0400004          ORR      r0,r0,#4
000aac  f8c90200          STR      r0,[r9,#0x200]
;;;1664   
;;;1665           /* Wait for HIRC clock ready */
;;;1666           CLK_WaitClockReady(CLK_STATUS_HIRCSTB_Msk);
000ab0  2010              MOVS     r0,#0x10
000ab2  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_WaitClockReady
                  |L1.2742|
;;;1667   
;;;1668           /* Select PLLFN source clock from HIRC */
;;;1669           u32FIN = __HIRC;
;;;1670       }
;;;1671   
;;;1672       /* Check PLL frequency range */
;;;1673       /* Constraint 1: 50MHz < FOUT < 500MHz */
;;;1674       if((u32PllFreq <= FREQ_500MHZ) && (u32PllFreq >= FREQ_50MHZ))
000ab6  486f              LDR      r0,|L1.3188|
000ab8  183a              ADDS     r2,r7,r0
000aba  486f              LDR      r0,|L1.3192|
000abc  4282              CMP      r2,r0
000abe  d872              BHI      |L1.2982|
;;;1675       {
;;;1676           /* Select "NO" according to request frequency */
;;;1677           if((u32PllFreq < FREQ_100MHZ) && (u32PllFreq >= FREQ_50MHZ))
000ac0  486c              LDR      r0,|L1.3188|
000ac2  4240              RSBS     r0,r0,#0
000ac4  4282              CMP      r2,r0
000ac6  d20c              BCS      |L1.2786|
;;;1678           {
;;;1679               u32NO = 3UL;
000ac8  2003              MOVS     r0,#3
;;;1680               u32FVCO = u32PllFreq << 2;
000aca  00bf              LSLS     r7,r7,#2
000acc  e013              B        |L1.2806|
                  |L1.2766|
000ace  f8d90200          LDR      r0,[r9,#0x200]        ;1650
000ad2  f0400001          ORR      r0,r0,#1              ;1650
000ad6  f8c90200          STR      r0,[r9,#0x200]        ;1650
000ada  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;1653
000adc  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_WaitClockReady
000ae0  e7e9              B        |L1.2742|
                  |L1.2786|
;;;1681           }
;;;1682           else if((u32PllFreq < FREQ_200MHZ) && (u32PllFreq >= FREQ_100MHZ))
000ae2  4866              LDR      r0,|L1.3196|
000ae4  4965              LDR      r1,|L1.3196|
000ae6  4438              ADD      r0,r0,r7
000ae8  4249              RSBS     r1,r1,#0
000aea  4288              CMP      r0,r1
000aec  d202              BCS      |L1.2804|
;;;1683           {
;;;1684               u32NO = 1UL;
000aee  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;1685               u32FVCO = u32PllFreq << 1;
000af0  007f              LSLS     r7,r7,#1
000af2  e000              B        |L1.2806|
                  |L1.2804|
;;;1686           }
;;;1687           else
;;;1688           {
;;;1689               u32NO = 0UL;
000af4  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
                  |L1.2806|
;;;1690               u32FVCO = u32PllFreq;
;;;1691           }
;;;1692   
;;;1693           /* u32NR start from 3 to avoid calculation overflow */
;;;1694           u32NR = 3UL;
000af6  2403              MOVS     r4,#3
;;;1695   
;;;1696           for(; u32NR <= 32UL; u32NR++)   /* max NR = 32 since NR = INDIV+1 and INDIV = 0~31 */
;;;1697           {
;;;1698               u32FREF = u32FIN / u32NR;                               /* FREF = FIN/NR */
;;;1699   
;;;1700               if((u32FREF >= FREQ_1MHZ) && (u32FREF <= FREQ_8MHZ))    /* Constraint 2: 1MHz <= FREF <= 8MHz. */
000af8  4b61              LDR      r3,|L1.3200|
000afa  f8dfc188          LDR      r12,|L1.3204|
                  |L1.2814|
000afe  fbb6f1f4          UDIV     r1,r6,r4              ;1698
000b02  4419              ADD      r1,r1,r3
000b04  4561              CMP      r1,r12
