000b06  d823              BHI      |L1.2896|
;;;1701               {
;;;1702                   fNX_X = (float)((u32FVCO * u32NR)>>1)/u32FIN;
000b08  fb07f104          MUL      r1,r7,r4
000b0c  0849              LSRS     r1,r1,#1
000b0e  ee001a10          VMOV     s0,r1
000b12  eef80a40          VCVT.F32.U32 s1,s0
000b16  ee006a10          VMOV     s0,r6
000b1a  eeb81a40          VCVT.F32.U32 s2,s0
000b1e  ee800a81          VDIV.F32 s0,s1,s2
;;;1703                   u32NF = (uint32_t)fNX_X;
000b22  eefc0ac0          VCVT.U32.F32 s1,s0
000b26  ee105a90          VMOV     r5,s1
;;;1704   
;;;1705                   if((u32NF >= 12) && (u32NF <= 255))    /* Constraint 4: 12<= NF <= 255. */
000b2a  f1a5010c          SUB      r1,r5,#0xc
000b2e  29f3              CMP      r1,#0xf3
000b30  d80e              BHI      |L1.2896|
;;;1706                   {
;;;1707                       fX = fNX_X - u32NF;
000b32  ee005a90          VMOV     s1,r5
000b36  eef80a60          VCVT.F32.U32 s1,s1
000b3a  ee300a60          VSUB.F32 s0,s0,s1
;;;1708                       u32X = (uint32_t)(fX*4096);
000b3e  eddf0a52          VLDR     s1,|L1.3208|
000b42  ee200a20          VMUL.F32 s0,s0,s1
000b46  eebc0ac0          VCVT.U32.F32 s0,s0
000b4a  ee108a10          VMOV     r8,s0
;;;1709                       break;
000b4e  e002              B        |L1.2902|
                  |L1.2896|
000b50  1c64              ADDS     r4,r4,#1              ;1696
000b52  2c20              CMP      r4,#0x20              ;1696
000b54  d9d3              BLS      |L1.2814|
                  |L1.2902|
;;;1710                   }
;;;1711               }
;;;1712           }
;;;1713   
;;;1714           if(u32NR <= 32UL)
000b56  2c20              CMP      r4,#0x20
000b58  d825              BHI      |L1.2982|
;;;1715           {
;;;1716               /* Enable and apply new PLLFN setting. */
;;;1717               CLK->PLLFNCTL0 = (u32X << CLK_PLLFNCTL0_FRDIV_Pos) |
000b5a  ea4f4108          LSL      r1,r8,#16
000b5e  ea413380          ORR      r3,r1,r0,LSL #14
000b62  1e61              SUBS     r1,r4,#1
000b64  ea432141          ORR      r1,r3,r1,LSL #9
000b68  1eab              SUBS     r3,r5,#2
000b6a  4319              ORRS     r1,r1,r3
000b6c  f8c91248          STR      r1,[r9,#0x248]
;;;1718                                (u32NO << CLK_PLLFNCTL0_OUTDIV_Pos) |
;;;1719                                ((u32NR - 1UL) << CLK_PLLFNCTL0_INDIV_Pos) |
;;;1720                                ((u32NF - 2UL) << CLK_PLLFNCTL0_FBDIV_Pos);
;;;1721               CLK->PLLFNCTL1 = u32PllClkSrc;
000b70  f8c9a24c          STR      r10,[r9,#0x24c]
;;;1722   
;;;1723               /* Actual PLL output clock frequency. FOUT = (FIN/NR)*2*(NF.X)*(1/NO) */
;;;1724               u32PllClk = (uint32_t)((float)u32FIN / (((u32NO + 1UL) * u32NR)<<11) * ((u32NF<<12)+u32X));
000b74  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
000b76  4360              MULS     r0,r4,r0
000b78  02c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#11
000b7a  ee000a10          VMOV     s0,r0
000b7e  eb083005          ADD      r0,r8,r5,LSL #12
000b82  eef80a40          VCVT.F32.U32 s1,s0
000b86  ee006a10          VMOV     s0,r6
000b8a  eeb80a40          VCVT.F32.U32 s0,s0
000b8e  ee801a20          VDIV.F32 s2,s0,s1
000b92  ee000a10          VMOV     s0,r0
000b96  eeb80a40          VCVT.F32.U32 s0,s0
000b9a  ee210a00          VMUL.F32 s0,s2,s0
000b9e  eebc0ac0          VCVT.U32.F32 s0,s0
000ba2  ee10ba10          VMOV     r11,s0
                  |L1.2982|
;;;1725           }
;;;1726       }
;;;1727   
;;;1728       if((u32PllFreq > FREQ_500MHZ) || (u32PllFreq < FREQ_50MHZ) || (u32NR==33) )
000ba6  4834              LDR      r0,|L1.3192|
000ba8  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
000baa  4282              CMP      r2,r0
000bac  d201              BCS      |L1.2994|
000bae  2c21              CMP      r4,#0x21
000bb0  d107              BNE      |L1.3010|
                  |L1.2994|
;;;1729       {
;;;1730           /* Apply default PLLFN setting and return */
;;;1731           CLK->PLLFNCTL0 = CLK_PLLCTL_192MHz_HXT;
000bb2  f244201e          MOV      r0,#0x421e
000bb6  f8c90248          STR      r0,[r9,#0x248]
;;;1732           CLK->PLLFNCTL1 = u32PllClkSrc;
000bba  f8c9a24c          STR      r10,[r9,#0x24c]
;;;1733   
;;;1734           /* Actual PLLFN output clock frequency */
;;;1735           u32PllClk = FREQ_192MHZ;
000bbe  f8dfb0cc          LDR      r11,|L1.3212|
                  |L1.3010|
;;;1736       }
;;;1737   
;;;1738       /* Wait for PLLFN clock stable */
;;;1739       CLK_WaitClockReady(CLK_STATUS_PLLFNSTB_Msk);
000bc2  f44f6080          MOV      r0,#0x400
000bc6  f7fffffe          BL       CLK_WaitClockReady
;;;1740   
;;;1741       /* Return actual PLLFN output clock frequency */
;;;1742       return u32PllClk;
000bca  4658              MOV      r0,r11
;;;1743   }
000bcc  e8bd8ff0          POP      {r4-r11,pc}
;;;1744   
                          ENDP

                  CLK_GetPLLFNClockFreq PROC
;;;1751     */
;;;1752   uint32_t CLK_GetPLLFNClockFreq(void)
000bd0  b508              PUSH     {r3,lr}
;;;1753   {
;;;1754       uint32_t u32PllFreq = 0UL, u32PllReg0, u32PllReg1;
000bd2  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;1755       uint32_t u32FIN, u32NF, u32NR, u32NO, u32X;
;;;1756       uint8_t au8NoTbl[4] = {1U, 2U, 2U, 4U};
000bd4  f2af71b0          ADR      r1,|L1.1064|
000bd8  6809              LDR      r1,[r1,#0]
000bda  9100              STR      r1,[sp,#0]
;;;1757   
;;;1758       /* Get PLLFN configuration */
;;;1759       u32PllReg0 = CLK->PLLFNCTL0;
000bdc  4a16              LDR      r2,|L1.3128|
000bde  3a48              SUBS     r2,r2,#0x48
000be0  6811              LDR      r1,[r2,#0]
;;;1760       u32PllReg1 = CLK->PLLFNCTL1;
000be2  6852              LDR      r2,[r2,#4]
;;;1761   
;;;1762       if(u32PllReg1 & (CLK_PLLFNCTL1_PD_Msk|CLK_PLLFNCTL1_OE_Msk) )
000be4  f0124fa0          TST      r2,#0x50000000
000be8  d125              BNE      |L1.3126|
;;;1763       {
;;;1764           u32PllFreq = 0UL;       /* PLLFN is in power down mode or fix low */
;;;1765       }
;;;1766       else                        /* PLLFN is in normal mode */
;;;1767       {
;;;1768           /* PLLFN source clock */
;;;1769           if(u32PllReg1 & CLK_PLLFNCTL1_PLLSRC_Msk)
;;;1770           {
;;;1771               u32FIN = __HIRC;    /* PLLFN source clock from HIRC */
000bea  4821              LDR      r0,|L1.3184|
;;;1772           }
;;;1773           else
;;;1774           {
;;;1775               u32FIN = __HXT;     /* PLLFN source clock from HXT */
;;;1776           }
;;;1777   
;;;1778           /* Calculate PLLFN frequency */
;;;1779           if(u32PllReg1 & CLK_PLLFNCTL1_BP_Msk)
000bec  0092              LSLS     r2,r2,#2
000bee  d422              BMI      |L1.3126|
;;;1780           {
;;;1781               u32PllFreq = u32FIN;  /* PLLFN is in bypass mode */
;;;1782           }
;;;1783           else
;;;1784           {
;;;1785               /* PLLFN is output enabled in normal work mode */
;;;1786               u32NO = au8NoTbl[((u32PllReg0 & CLK_PLLFNCTL0_OUTDIV_Msk) >> CLK_PLLFNCTL0_OUTDIV_Pos)];
000bf0  f3c13281          UBFX     r2,r1,#14,#2
000bf4  f81d0002          LDRB     r0,[sp,r2]
;;;1787               u32NF = ((u32PllReg0 & CLK_PLLFNCTL0_FBDIV_Msk) >> CLK_PLLFNCTL0_FBDIV_Pos) + 2UL;
000bf8  f3c10208          UBFX     r2,r1,#0,#9
000bfc  1c92              ADDS     r2,r2,#2
;;;1788               u32NR = ((u32PllReg0 & CLK_PLLFNCTL0_INDIV_Msk) >> CLK_PLLFNCTL0_INDIV_Pos) + 1UL;
000bfe  f3c12344          UBFX     r3,r1,#9,#5
000c02  1c5b              ADDS     r3,r3,#1
;;;1789               u32X  = ((u32PllReg0 & CLK_PLLFNCTL0_FRDIV_Msk) >> CLK_PLLFNCTL0_FRDIV_Pos);
000c04  f3c1410b          UBFX     r1,r1,#16,#12
;;;1790   
;;;1791               u32PllFreq = (uint32_t)((float)u32FIN / ((u32NO * u32NR)<<11) * ( ((u32NF<<12)+u32X)));
000c08  fb10f003          SMULBB   r0,r0,r3
000c0c  02c0              LSLS     r0,r0,#11
000c0e  ee000a10          VMOV     s0,r0
000c12  ed9f1a1f          VLDR     s2,|L1.3216|
000c16  eb013002          ADD      r0,r1,r2,LSL #12
000c1a  eeb80a40          VCVT.F32.U32 s0,s0
000c1e  eec10a00          VDIV.F32 s1,s2,s0
000c22  ee000a10          VMOV     s0,r0
000c26  eeb80a40          VCVT.F32.U32 s0,s0
000c2a  ee200a80          VMUL.F32 s0,s1,s0
000c2e  eebc0ac0          VCVT.U32.F32 s0,s0
000c32  ee100a10          VMOV     r0,s0
                  |L1.3126|
;;;1792           }
;;;1793       }
;;;1794   
;;;1795       return u32PllFreq;
;;;1796   }
000c36  bd08              POP      {r3,pc}
;;;1797   
                          ENDP

                  |L1.3128|
                          DCD      0x40000290
                  |L1.3132|

000c88  45800000          DCFS     0x45800000 ; 4096

000c90  4b371b00          DCFS     0x4b371b00 ; 12000000
